Consists of a three-part exosuit (tactical helmet, tactical vest and an anti-ballistic environmental jumpsuit) fitted with modern, if somewhat alien, powered servos. Wearing this suit feels like being buried under the concrete of the Sarcophagus itself - terrifyingly claustrophobic for most stalkers, but eerily comforting for true servants of the Monolith. \n \n
en.monolith_exolight_outfit_description: The "underwear" of an exoskeleton, sometimes mistakenly known as the "Radsuit". This outfit provides almost all the protection one can expect from a full exoskeleton, but due to being stripped of its servos and batteries, it provides none of the strength enhancement. On the positive side, this means the suit is now easier to maintain and, unlike a full exoskeleton, does not prevent the wearer from sprinting. A favourite among the Monolith's battle preachers and tactical masters, who claim the confines of the suit to be as comforting as the Sarcophagus itself.\n \n
en.monolith_nbc_outfit_description: An old CBRN suit with a kevlar vest, most commonly associated with the fanatical zealots who defend the centre of the Zone from other stalkers. These suits were first used by military personnel after the 1986 accident in order to aid in the cleanup process. Shows obvious signs of immense age and irreparable wear. How so many of these suits were left behind, and how they eventually found their way into the hands of the Monolith, is a mystery. Comes with a refurbished integrated GP-5 gas mask.\n \n
en.monolith_outfit_description: A mysterious outfit associated with the Monolith faction. It consists of an environmental bodysuit that provides more than adequate chemical and radiological protection, underneath a ballistic vest capable of stopping weak pistol rounds. Its anomaly protection, however, is subpar. Previously of unknown origin, scores of these suits were found in containers and lockers underneath the X18 facility in Dark Valley. Although the stalkers who found this cache have since all mysteriously disappeared, this discovery has nonetheless launched thousands of conspiracy theories among stalkers of other factions, the premise of many claiming that these suits predate the creation of the Zone itself.\n \n
en.monolith_proto_exo_outfit_description: An armour made by either Monolithians or an unknown manufacturer. It has been specially modified to fit with the servos and batteries of an exoskeleton, allowing the wearer to carry significantly more equipment than they could under any other circumstances, but lacking the armour of a proper exosuit. Compared to a full exoskeleton, it provides less protection and has less efficient servos, but is also considerably cheaper to maintain.\n \n
en.monolith_scientific_light_outfit_descrip: A SEVA-like suit made virtually from scratch by an unknown craftsman. Compared to an ordinary Monolith scientific suit, this outfit is lighter and provides better protection from both thermal and chemical burns. Other than that, however, it's outright worse. It is unknown what role this suit fills within the Monolith faction as a whole, although it's been speculated that it's purpose is largely ceremonial.\n \n
en.monolith_scientific_outfit_description: The Monolith scientific suit includes a flak vest of unknown origin and also features unique modifications for greater resistance to radiation at the cost of being more vulnerable to psy-fields. The anomaly protection system otherwise matches the SEVA bodysuit. Curiously, according to some legends, these suits are most often worn by the soldiers who defend the Brain Scorcher in Radar, although no one outside the Monolith faction can easily confirm.\n \n
en.mutant_boar_chop_description:
The most popular meat in the Zone. Nutritious and hardly contaminated. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_chimera_meat_description:
A heavy chunk of chimera meat. Since chimeras are considered one of the most dangerous creatures, their meat is highly valued by veteran stalkers who are willing to buy it for fairly high prices. The cook on Skadovsk uses this meat as one of the ingredients of the so called masculine meal, although only few claim that it tastes better than boar meat. Can be sold to the scientists. Furthermore, it provides the best quality animal fat available in the Zone which can be used for the purposes of very effective gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  high-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_dog_meat_description:
Meat of mutated dogs is used as a cheap alternative to the more popular boar meat. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_flesh_meat_description:
A popular choice in the Zone, flesh meat has a good taste and high nutritional value. The scientists have enough samples already, which limits its use as a commodity. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_krovosos_meat_description:
Bloodsucker meat is stringy and thus not suited for eating. Although bloodsuckers are fearsome beasts, the price of the meat is not very high due to its limited use. Can be sold to the scientists. Moreover, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
  •  high-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_lurker_meat_description:
A good chunk of lurker meat. Nutritious and hardly contaminated. Can be sold to the scientists. However, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  high-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_psevdodog_meat_description:
Pseudodog meat is a common dietary component in the Zone. Tasty, with high nutritional value, a popular choice among stalkers. Can be sold to the scientists. Moreover, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_psysucker_meat_description:
Similar to bloodsuckers, Psysucker meat is stringy and thus not suited for eating. The price of the meat is not very high due to its limited use. Can be sold to the scientists. Moreover, it can also serve as a source of animal fat for gun lubrication.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
  •  high-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_snork_hand_description:
As is widely known, snorks originate from humans, so eating their meat is considered cannibalistic and immoral. However, certain factions, such as bandits and mercenaries, include it in their meals so as to show their superiority over other groups. Can be sold to the scientists who make better use of it.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.mutant_tushkano_meat_description:
A small portion of a mutated rodent's body. A cheap and commonly found food that is said to strengthen your heart after being cooked in open fire. Can be sold to the scientists.
 
 WARNING:
 
Stalkers are advised to refrain from eating raw meat as animals and mutants in the Zone are likely to be carrying trichinosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted by ingesting infected meat. The symptoms include fever, fatigue and appetite loss, all of which are extremely dangerous given the conditions in the Zone. Abscesses, fungal growth and tumours on the surface of the body indicate that the meat is infected and should be disposed of.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low-tier mutant meat
  •  cookable
  •  toxic food
en.nbc_dolg_outfit_description: Artefact hunters among the Duty faction are rare, but this suit - based on standard NBC designs - exists to facilitate their lives and fulfill their obligations to aid the Ecologist faction. Compared to the standard PS5-M suit, this outfit boasts an integrated GP-5 gas mask as well as belt slots for AAMs and a highly efficient weight distribution system to help carry all the required equipment. Not the best suit in its class, it tends to be replaced once the Dutyer in question has the rank required for something better.\n \n
en.nbc_freedom_outfit_description: Based on the NBC suit designs used by neutral stalkers, this outfit is a variant made by Freedom's local craftsmen. While not on par with the standard NBC in some areas, the faction nevertheless managed to make an outstanding breakthrough in one area - chemical protection. This suit is something of a favourite among Freedomers who want to explore the Zone's myriad ruins without fear of chemical or radiological threats, especially when its highly efficient weight distribution system is factored in. Comes with an integrated GP-5 gas mask as standard.\n \n
en.nbc_merc_outfit_description: A CBRN suit with a kevlar vest, primarily used by Mercs on a budget. Outfits like these are mass-produced in factories outside the Zone for use in long-term military operations and disaster clean-ups all over the world. It comes standard with a GP-5 gas mask using a hose leading to a modern filter. Although clearly not made with the Zone's specific conditions in mind, it's nonetheless a popular choice among those who appreciate efficient weight distribution systems, although this model sports sub-par environmental protection compared to most locally made suits.\n \n
en.nbc_outfit_description: A budget CBRN suit with a kevlar vest. Outfits like these are mass-produced in factories outside the Zone for use in long-term military operations and disaster clean-ups all over the world. It comes standard with a GP-5 gas mask using a hose leading to a modern filter. Although clearly not made with the Zone's specific conditions in mind, it's nonetheless a popular choice among those who appreciate efficient weight distribution systems, and the overall protection is still comparable to an average stalker suit.\n \n
en.nomad_outfit_description: A Zone-assembled suit that has been handmade by local craftsmen as a matter of survival. This particular outfit is of high quality and feels exceptionally light and comfortable to wear, despite being much more protective overall when compared to other stalker suits. It is clear that whoever assembled this armour was highly familiar with the Zone's nature, and evidently put a great deal of pride and care into their work - something that might not have been true of its previous owner. Either way, its quality is matched only by its price.\n \n
en.nosorog_outfit_description: A next generation exoskeleton, consisting of a doubly reinforced exosuit and an armoured Czech-M10 gas mask. This suit is rumoured to have been the brainchild of a now deceased stalker named "Fang", whose designs were later claimed by all sorts of powerful factions across the Zone. If regular exoskeletons allow stalkers to feel like a light vehicle, the Nosorog almost makes them believe they're a main battle tank, able to withstand incredible punishment while carrying tremendous ordnance. Typically only available to a faction's most valuable members, and even then only during exceptionally dangerous missions.\n \n
en.novice_outfit_camo_description: A warm leather anorak worn over a cosy turtleneck sweater, tucked into sturdy jeans and hiking boots. Formerly owned by a typical firearm enthusiast, it sports several advantages over an ordinary jacket - namely a camouflage pattern and a higher quality material choice alongside a more educated weight distribution system. Still utterly inadequate for the Zone's harsh conditions.\n \n
en.novice_outfit_description: A warm leather anorak worn over a cosy turtleneck sweater, tucked into sturdy jeans and hiking boots. The outfit of choice among naive or inexperienced stalkers, veterans consider it barely a step above walking around the Zone in your underwear.\n \n
en.novice_outfit_tourist_description: A warm leather anorak with an integrated backpack, worn over a cosy turtleneck sweater, tucked into sturdy jeans and hiking boots. It seems the previous owner was a real lover for hikes. The educated choice of materials and weight management system makes this more useful than most leather jackets, but is still unsuitable for anything more than quiet walks along the Zone's borders.\n \n
en.redline_novice_outfit_description: A snazzy bright red leather anorak worn over a cosy turtleneck sweater, tucked into sturdy jeans and hiking boots. The colour alone should be reason enough to avoid use in the Zone.\n \n
en.renegade_exo_outfit_description: One of a few exoskeletons assembled by the Renegades back in 2011 to help secure their final push into Clear Sky's base. Unfortunately, they were virtually wiped out before their final victory ever came, thanks to the interference of a Mercenary with a trench coat and a marksman rifle. Modern Renegades who wear this armour always go into battle like a man possessed, eager to mete vengeance upon their most hated foes. That is to say, almost everyone else.\n \n
en.renegade_scientific_outfit_description: This comfortable bodysuit, originally intended for research in the Zone, makes for a great alternative to the various Light Combat or hand-made suits one might have access to. Provides genuinely excellent protection against thermal and chemical hazards, along with good protection against blunt trauma. Still, for a SEVA suit, this armour is fairly mediocre overall.\n \n
en.renegademerc_outfit_description: A light combat suit obtained through shady means to help armour local groups of Renegades. Its design is based on the suit used by the special forces of Western armies. Surprisingly pleasant to wear, this outfit provides more than adequate protection from small arms, lacerations and errant shrapnel. Still, it is not really intended for use in areas of high radiological or anomalous activity, and as such few wearers will be found deep in the Zone with any regularity.\n \n
en.scientific_outfit_description: This suit was produced by one of Kiev's defence research institutes and represents an excellent alternative to hand-made stalker suits. It combines a closed cycle breathing system and an integrated system of anomalous field suppression with a more than adequate ballistic vest. Due to the perfect materials, this suit is a good choice. Still, it is expensive, and those who prefer pitched battle over careful anomaly investigation are advised to look elsewhere.\n \n
en.specops_bandit_outfit_description: A set of PS5 series body armour with beryllium sputter, acquired through shady means by the Zone's Bandits. Although the suit shows visible signs of irreparable wear and tear, it's still an excellent choice for battle when both protection and mobility is needed. Not really recommended for use near anomalies, however.\n \n
en.specops_dolg_outfit_description: This item comprises military PS5 series body armour with beryllium sputter modified for use in the Zone. Compared to a standard PS5-M universal protection suit, this outfit is more ergonomic and protective overall, but is slightly less insulated and provides much less defence against heavy impacts, like a poltergeist's telekinetic attack.\n \n
en.specops_merc_outfit_description: Spetsnaz body armour "acquired" and repurposed by the Zone's Mercenaries. Provides good physical protection while also being remarkably comfortable to wear, although its weaknesses against environmental hazards demand it be used alongside a high quality gas mask and helmet. Often worn by Mercenaries who used to work for the SSU.\n \n
en.specops_outfit_description: This item comprises military PS5 series body armour with beryllium sputter modified for use in the Zone. Designed for intense rapid-insertion assault operations, this outfit is standard issue for most Spetsnaz operators in the Zone, but requires a high quality respirator to counteract its weaknesses against radiation and anomalies. Occasionally, this suit will be sold to ordinary stalkers in exchange for various "favours".\n \n
en.st_addon_scope_0kp2_descr: The original design of OKP sights allows firing from unstable positions in rapidly changing conditions, reduces the operator fatigue, and, if necessary, allows unhindered use of base mechanical sights. The key feature of this sight is a rimless reflector attachment that doesn't block any field of fire sections; instead, reflector is protected by thin and durable visor that is almost un-noticeable when firing. This variant is installed on the dovetail type mount.

en.st_addon_scope_aim_low_descr: No matter what your mission, the size and weight of your equipment is a critical factor. With the Aimpoint® Micro T-1, Aimpoint has introduced an aiming system that provides the performance of our full-sized sights in a small package. Since its introduction in 2007, the Aimpoint® Micro T-1 has become very popular worldwide due to its size, light weight and robust build quality.

en.st_addon_scope_aimpoint_pro_descr: Aimpoint Patrol Rifle Optic is designed with input from a distinguished group of current and former professionals. The Patrol Rifle Optic incorporates many never before seen features to maximize this sight's performance within the challenging conditions faced by modern law enforcement. The Aimpoint® PRO sight comes in a ready-to-go kit at a budget friendly price, a concept that appeals strongly to Law Enforcement units.

en.st_addon_scope_compm4s_descr: The Aimpoint® CompM4s sight, with low battery compartment, belongs to the CompM4 series of sights which are the finest sights Aimpoint has ever produced. Improvements include advanced energy efficiency that provides up to 8 years of continuous use from a single AA battery!
en.st_addon_scope_d0cter_descr: Docter as a brand was born in 1991, but the company started writing its story much earlier. It was previously called Carl Zeiss Jena. In the 1980s, this was one of the largest optics manufacturing companies in the world. They started operating more than 100 years ago and built an impeccable reputation throughout the years. After World War II, the company started growing rapidly and bloomed until East and West Germany merged in 1991. This was when the first major change happened – the company was taken over by Bernhard Docter. Shockingly, the company bankrupted. Analytic Jena Group bought Docter in 1997, and the company started growing again. In 2018, a change in administration occurred. The company was renamed from Docter to Noblex. Most of the products remained in the offer but Noblex added some new ones as well. They retained the famous logo – the owl. Throughout the years, Docter has been known to offer high-quality Made-in-Germany products for an affordable price. Because of that, the company gathered plenty of followers, loyal to the brand. Since 2018, when Noblex took over, the company expanded their manufacturing processes elsewhere.
en.st_addon_scope_deltapoint_descr: The DeltaPoint Pro is proof that you don’t have to compromise performance, even on a small sight. Its incredibly wide field-of-view and crystal-clear glass dominates the competition, while its rugged aluminum housing and steel sheath ensure it will perform in the harshest conditions. Ease-of-use was also a focus when designing this elite red dot sight, which is why we put an easy access battery compartment on top and gave it click-adjustments for more precision. And this isn’t just a pistol sight either; the DP Pro is just as at home on AR’s, shotguns, and pretty much anything else that goes bang.

en.st_addon_scope_e0t2_descr: The XPS3 is smaller and lighter than all other holographic weapon sights but just as fast. Law enforcement officers and hunters appreciate the light weight and compact size for carrying convenience on the job and in the woods. The XPS3 runs on a single 123 battery. The single-lithium-battery configuration allows more rail space, leaving more room for rear-iron sights, magnifiers, or a night vision mount.

en.st_addon_scope_ekp8_18_descr: Kobra Military 8-18 Red Dot Weaver Rifle Scope, Screw Mount. The world famous Kobra is an open collimator "red dot" combat optic using laser-generated "heads-up display" (HUD) technology to superimpose a reticle pattern onto a filtered lens which acts as an aiming device for the shooter. This system presents an unobstructed field of view, in 1x power which allows for extremely comfortable, "both eyes open" shooting. On average, most users will see a 1.5 times faster target acquisition and a 50% smaller shot group at 100 meters, in comparison to the iron sights. It is designed for engaging fast moving targets and targets appearing for a short period of time in close quarters and urban combat situations in various light conditions. It provides clear targeting from 104 lx to 10-2 lx (daylight, twilight and moonlight), one- or two-eye targeting, is very effective when shooting from moving vehicles, and allows for perfect kill shots on fast-moving, small and spontaneously appearing targets.

Housed in rugged forged aluminum, it's extremely tough yet lightweight. The easy-to-use adjusters with audible clicks allow for quick windage and elevation adjustments. Featuring eight available brightness settings, the reticle can be manually adjusted by pressing the plus or minus buttons on either side of the unit. To switch to auto adjust mode, simply press both buttons simultaneously and release.

COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  9 mm Cal.
 
Light sound suppressor made by SilencerCo for 9mm pistols.
en.st_addon_sil_pbs1_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  7.62 calibre weapons
 
Suppressor for noiseless and flameless firing from Kalashnikov 7.62mm.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_sil_pbs4_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  5.45 calibre weapons
 
Suppressor for AKS-74U rifle.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_sil_pl15_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  Lebedev PL-15
 
Sound suppressor with anti-heat casing for Lebedev PL-15 Pistol.
 
 •  Sound suppression: High
en.st_addon_sil_pmm_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  9 mm Cal.
 
Sound suppressor for PMM pistols. Also can be used with any 9x18 pistols with similar barrel thread.
en.st_addon_sil_rotor_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  7.62 Cal.
 
Rotor 43 muzzle brake, is designed for installation on SVDS 7.62x54. Although positioned as a muzzle brake, it also works as a sound suppressor.
 
 •  Sound suppression: low
en.st_addon_sil_salvo_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  12 calibre
 
Salvo 12 silencer for 12" shotguns made by SilencerCo. Designed to operate with most pump action and semi automatic shotguns and almost all commercially available ammunition, at its full length of 12" the Salvo 12 brings sound down to 136.8 dB at the muzzle with #7 shot. Configurations of 6", 8", 10", and 12" allow the end user to customize the Salvo 12 for sporting clay, waterfowl, turkey hunting, home defense, and many other applications and accept the appropriate tradeoff of size for sound reduction. 
 
 •  Sound suppression: high
en.st_addon_sil_scorp_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 • Skorpion vz.61
 
Silencer for Skorpion vz.61 SMG.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_sil_spec_isg_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  ISG Fire Arms: 5.45/7.62мм
 
Sound suppressor used by ISG units in Zone. Made by Rifle Dynamics US company.
 
 •  Sound suppression: High
en.st_addon_sil_sr1m_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  SR1MP 9x21 Pistol
 
Standard-issue silencer for SR-1MP pistol. Requires a tactical set with long barrel to be installed on the weapon.
 
 •  Sound suppression: High
en.st_addon_sil_sr25_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  7.62 mm calibre weapons
 
Suppressor for the SR-25
 
 •  Sound suppression: high
en.st_addon_sil_surfire_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  M4 Tactical
 
Surefire SOCOM556-MONSTER 5.56x45 and .223 silencer.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_sil_tgp-a_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  5.45 calibre weapons
 
Suppressor for AK rifle series and RPK-74 machine guns.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_sil_tgpv_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  7.62 Cal.
 
Tactical suppressor/flash hider designed specifically for use on SVDS rifle. Also can be used on some of PKM/PKP series MG's.
en.st_addon_sil_timberwolf: PGW Defense Timberwolf .338 LM sound suppressor
en.st_addon_sil_timberwolf_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 • Remington 700 AICS, Remington 700 McMillan
 
Timberwolf is a silencer for .338 sniper rifles. Produced by the Canadian company PGW Defense.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_sil_veresk_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  SR-2M SMG
 
Sound Suppressor for using with SR-2M SMG.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_sil_vihr_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  9x39 calibre weapons
 
Suppressor for the SR-3M rifle.
 
 •  Sound suppression: very high
en.st_addon_silencer_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  5.56x45 calibre weapons 
 
Advanced rifle suppressor of US design and manufacture, which has apparently 'disappeared' from one of the US Army supply containers. It consists of hi-grade steel body filled with four extension chambers, followed by a series of Z-type titanium baffles. The unit almost completely reduces muzzle flash and considerably suppresses sound emitted when firing. It also requires minimum maintenance. Suppressors of this and similar types are commonly used on all smallbore Western-made rifles and remain in active service in Western armed forces.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_addon_silencer_shak12_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  12.7x55 calibre weapons
 
A relatively small Suppressor for the ShAK-12, not big and strong enough to completely silence the gun or to reduce the muzzleflash enough to be just whiffs of smoke, but still enough to suppress it nicely and further reduce the muzzleflash.
 
 •  Sound suppression: medium
en.st_adrenalin_descr:
Epinephrine (also known as adrenalin) is a hormone and a neurotransmitter. Epinephrine has many functions in the body, instantly regulating heart rate, blood vessel and air passage diameters, and metabolic shifts. Epinephrine release is a crucial component of the fight-or-flight response of the sympathetic nervous system. The effects lead to increased blood glucose and fatty acids, providing substrates for instant energy production within cells throughout the body.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  very potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_af_absorbent_descr: A rare artefact. Properties are unstudied. Can form in absolutely any anomaly. Radioactive.
en.st_af_atom_descr:
A rare and beautiful abnormal formation. Looks like an Atom. Is a weak source of heat. Has no useful properties, Not radioactive. Very valuable to collectors .
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_ball_descr:
There is no data on the conditions under which this round artefact is formed, hence the name, but practice shows that it is most often found in places of increased electrical activity. Very agile and bouncy artefact. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_baloon3_descr: A piece of tightly compressed snowflakes and the smallest parts of the victims of anomaly, shape resembling a heart. It has a positive effect on the body as a whole. Radioactive.
en.st_af_baloon_descr:
A compound of several hollow organic formations, this artefact emits a gaseous substance that can neutralise chemical or toxic particles inside the body without harming it. Thus providing a a great level of toxic and chemical protection. 
It also has a constant temperature regardless of its surroundings. This allows it to absorb heat from its vicinity and to create a little pocket around the user which prevents the flames from damaging the body. 
Apart from that Bubble, however, possesses numerous negative properties. For example, it greatly amplifies the effects of psy-waves as well as fields produced by mutants and anomalies. This disadvantage is not to be taken lightly: some stalkers have reported that psy influence was so potent when in possession of a Bubble that they felt their heads cracking from the inside and the only thing they could do was scream in pain and run as far as they could. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_bat_descr:
A very beautiful abnormal formation. Has no useful properties, Not radioactive and quite heavy. Valued by collectors.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_black_angel_descr:
A root-like artefact. When not in contact with anything, it lets out a bit of steam from it's surface. Very valued by collectors. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_black_descr: Very strange artefact, which behavior is similar to parasite. The black stone kills its owner, but in return increases power and treats open wounds, as if it does not want to share the blood of the owner.
en.st_af_black_spray_descr:
Being a rare artefact, little is known about its properties and origins. 
Black Spray shares a similar shape to other sapphire-like artefacts. However, the organic nature of the stem (which shares similar properties to Pin artefacts) suggests that its formed from vascular plants under exposure to dangerous psy-fields and electromagnetic waves. 
Another unique property is the ability to delay the transmission of light that enters it. The said mysterious mechanism is applied to psy-waves surrounding the artefact as well. For this particular reason, Black Spray significantly neutralises psy interferences in a large radius. 
These beneficial properties, however, come at a price. This artefact is extremely dangerous when exposed in toxic environments as it amplifies their effect and increases their potency. When exploring toxic areas, it is hence highly recommended to keep the artefact in your backpack. 
Due to the beautiful blue aura it emits, it is highly sought after by jewellers all over the world. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_blood2_descr: It is a rather ugly reddish formation of compressed and fancy curved polymerized plants residue, soil and bones. Slightly increases carry weight. Has no negative properties.
en.st_af_blood3_descr: Micaceous formation in the form of an uneven circle. Color varies from white to light blue, there are also blue, green and grayish specimens that can be found. By weight and by feel, the bracelet resembles a metal, but it actually consists of the thinnest scales of an unknown material. It is valued for rare beauty and health-beneficial effects. Radioactive.
en.st_af_blood_descr:
A reddish formation of compressed fossilised plants, soil and animal debris. Can partially neutralise chemical poisons by absorbing them and reducing overall toxicity level in user's bloodstream. Quite widespread and not very effective as it makes chemical burns fester. It will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 
Another positive effect possessed by this artefact is that it accelerates clotting if worn close to the body. Although it is not recommended to keep this artefact in your possession for longer periods of time as blood clots can be hazardous to your health. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_bracelet_descr:
Bracelet is formed from common species of bryophytes plants under high exposure to radioactive and chemical anomalies, which explains its organic nature. 
It provides substantial protection against all types of acids by gradually increasing their pH to the level of water (pH of 7). 
When worn, the artefact is also known to slightly counter the harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of some mutants. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_brain_descr: This very rare artifact looks and feels like an exact copy of the brain, for which it is named. In case of injuries, it speeds up metabolic processes, which helps wounds to heal faster. It also weakens the effects of radiation.
en.st_af_bumerang_descr: A rare, unique artifact. Has a small radiation, increases resistance to thermal and electrical anomalies. Born in anomalous zones combining electra and fry.
en.st_af_cell_descr:
An artefact of gravitational nature. A useless trinket, yet is highly valued by collectors and jewellers. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_chelust_descr:
A very strange artefact. Generates a strong gravitational field while nothing touches it. Has no useful properties, very heavy. Valuable to collectors outside of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_chertyaico_descr: Dimensions and shape remotely resemble a chicken egg, has a deep black color and glitters under the light. If split, a very strong impulse of unknown nature emerges. Increases electrical protection and carried weight. Radioactive.
en.st_af_clear_sky_descr: Possibly exists in a single copy, second name Heart of the Monolith. Gives immunity to almost all negative effects of the zone.
en.st_af_cocoon_descr:
A formation of gravitational nature. A useless trinket, yet is highly valued by collectors and jewellers. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_compass_descr:
A very rare artefact. It's been several years since one was found. 
It can locate gaps in anomaly fields. It is believed that it can help one traverse the most complex anomaly fields completely unharmed. However, very few know how to handle it properly. 
The Compass showed few unique properties under last experiments. It can interact to moving objects, causing some to completely disappear. Or perhaps teleport? 
It also weakens the body by draining stamina and increasing bleeding rate constantly. But the biggest draw however, is the dangerous radiation output this artefact emits comparing to the artefact radiation scale. 
Holding this artefact near the body will cause death in matter of few minutes.
en.st_af_cristal_drops_descr: Solid, transparent artefact with a luminous substance inside. Moderately protects against electrical effects and restores energy. Radioactive.
en.st_af_cristall2_descr: The artefact spawns in anomalous zones under high temperatures conditions. Slowly removes radiation from the body. No negative properties.
en.st_af_cristall3_descr: Anomalous formation consisting of green arcs. Moderately protects against electrical effects and heals wounds. Radioactive.
en.st_af_cristall_descr:
This artefact is formed in anomalous zones with intense thermal activity. Actively consumes excessive heat and remains cool at all times. 
It will also protect the user against electrical currents. On the other hand, exposure to such environments makes the artefact increase the conductivity due to unknown as of now mechanism. For this reason, one is forced to weigh pros and cons of Crystal when in the vicinity of areas of high conductivity. 
This artefact is also highly sought for by jewellers outside the Zone as its inner core is not radioactive and considered to be of exceptional beauty if polished and refined. Only the first 1 cm of its outer layer emits radiation. 
It is, however, highly advised to proceed with caution when planning to bring the artefact to the market as prolonged exposure to even minimal amounts of radioactive materials can result in death of the user. Covered with very hard layer. Relatively heavy due to high density. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_cristall_flower2_descr: The artefact is basically a stone which has characteristics close to granites. It comes into being inside gravitational fields of huge intensity. Lowers weight of carried things and slightly protects against the effects of psi fields. Radioactive.
en.st_af_cristall_flower3_descr: Pinky, translucent grainy palm sized ingot. Increases carry weight, restores health and heals wounds. Radioactive.
en.st_af_cristall_flower_descr:
This artefact resembles melted cheese interspersed with sapphire-like stones. Only yellow outer shell of the artefact appears to give off radiation and by careful processing it is possible to extract the non-radioactive blue parts for jewellery and other industrial purposes. This is due to the fact that if cleaned properly and polished, sapphire comparison becomes much more explicit: the stones are as hard and durable as this beautiful gem. This quality of theirs and their appearance make them perfect gemstones and jewellers all over the world strive to have them in stock. 
The usefulness of the artefact, however, is not limited to its industrial applications. There is scientific evidence suggesting that sapphire-like stones effectively protect from psy-waves, whereas the outer shell slightly increases resistance to toxicity. 
However, it can cause objects in its vicinity to heat up and in extreme cases to ignite along with the artefact. For this reason, it is safe to conclude that it absorbs heat and is able to convey it to other objects. 
Due to its density the weight of artefact has increased beyond normal standards, and thus it is one of the heaviest anomalous creations in the Zone. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_crystal_blood_descr: It is a reddish formation of compacted and fossilized plant, soil, and animal remains. Has the ability to partially neutralize chemicals harmful to humans. Radioactive.
en.st_af_crystal_generator_descr: An artifact of electrical structure. Creates a field around itself that can dissipate electricity. Radioactive.
en.st_af_crystal_glassbeads_descr: Much about this artifact remains a mystery. However, it has been reliably established that the radiation generated by the pulsation of the Crystal Beads' thickenings causes blood in open wounds to clot very quickly. Radioactive.
en.st_af_crystal_gravi_descr: Artifact is formed by prolonged gravitational effects on metal-containing substances. Capable of maintaining a small anti-gravity field around itself. Many stalkers use it to significantly reduce the weight of their backpack. Radioactive.
en.st_af_crystal_ice_descr: Externally, the artifact resembles a "Kolobok"; it is widely believed to be a Kolobok crossed with a flash. Capable of dramatically increasing the wearer's muscle tone. Radioactive.
en.st_af_crystal_oko_descr: This very rare artifact looks like an eye, which is why it was named. When injured, it speeds up metabolic processes, which promotes rapid healing of wounds. Radioactive.
en.st_af_crystal_vyvert_descr: A bizarrely shaped artifact that occurs in areas of increased gravitational activity. It is a kind of sponge that absorbs radioactive elements. It successfully protects its bearer from both induced radiation and radioactive particles that have already entered the body.
en.st_af_dark_soul_descr: Малоизученный артефакт. Significantly increases stamina by utilizing the body's internal reserves, but is not in demand due to significant radioactivity.
en.st_af_death_lamp_descr:
"Big, red and cursed." 
This is how the locals prefer to describe the Death Lamp, while some refer to it as the "Seed of Satan". Many traders believe the rumours surrounding the artefact, thus refusing to buy it. Little is known about its origins, and nothing of value has been discovered so far. 
Death Lamp was first discovered few years ago by a group of three experienced stalkers. Shortly after delivering the artefact to the Ecologists in Yantar, two of them found dead with a horrific expression on their faces. Nothing is known about the fate of the third stalker. 
Following the accident, members of the science team who studied the artefact had reported having nightmare disorder in the days to follow. 
Apart from the mysterious effects, the artefact drains vitality and willpower from the user, often on such a scale that it induces dizziness and in extreme cases causes the user to faint. 
 
Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_deformer_descr: Unique artifact. Was found in a single instance on the rifts of Zaton. To this day, scientists have not come to a definite conclusion that the artifact is primary, the artifact is formed on the site of a fault in the Earth's crust, or the artifact itself generates these faults. Increases resistance to all types of anomalies. Radioactive.
en.st_af_dragon_eye_descr:
The artefact is mostly formed in fiery anomalies and has the appearance of a reptile's eye. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_dummy_battery3_descr: White, with blue overflowings ring made of light glassy material. Being put on a thin horizontal rod and slightly spun, it continues to move until stopped by the utmost force. The first one "Eternal Engine" found in the Zone. Moderately protects against chemicals, slightly restores energy reserves. Radioactive.
en.st_af_dummy_battery_descr:
The artefact is quite popular in the Zone and is valued by its residents and visitors alike for its energizing properties, although it has an adverse effect on the body when used for prolonged periods of time. 
One should take note, however, that this artefact hinders blood clotting and increases bleeding rate of open wounds. On the other hand, being a powerful resistor, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. 
Being an artefact of electric nature, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. On the contrary, it should be noted that Battery absorbs heat and is able to convey it to other objects. 
This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_dummy_dummy2_descr: Previously considered trash deprived of any beneficial properties. However, some time ago it turned out that when in constant contact with the human body, this artefact slightly enhances muscle tone.
en.st_af_dummy_dummy3_descr: The artefact resembles a blue spider, hence why it got its name. Quickly removes accumulated radiation and because of this it is greatly valued by all on the territory of the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone. Has no negative properties.
en.st_af_dummy_dummy_descr:
Shell is composed of two disk of bluish colour connected by semitransparent material of unknown nature. 
This strange artefact was considered devoid of any useful properties by many scientists for a long time. Only recently has it been discovered that it is indeed quite beneficial. 
When the artefact comes into contact with the body, it will make one feel rejuvenated and thus it increases stamina recovery. This effect has in case of some stalkers induced hyperactivity. One downside of this artefact, however, is that it reduces the number of platelets in blood, thus increasing bleeding rate. 
It provides a considerable level of psy protection and absorbs electromagnetic interference, acting as a grounding material. 
It will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. Caution must be taken when approaching heat sources with this artefact. 
Shell is extremely light and very portable. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_dummy_glassbeads2_descr: Much in this artefact remains a mystery. However, it was well established that radiation, arising with the pulsation of Beads thickenings, stops blood. Radioactive.
en.st_af_dummy_glassbeads3_descr: Well established that radiation from artefact's pulsation causes blood coagulation in open wounds. Also the artefact moderately protects against thermal effects. Radioactive.
en.st_af_dummy_glassbeads_descr:
Shaped like a DNA helix, Mama's Beads are created in the Burner anomaly. One of their most characteristic features is that they constantly pulsate, generating emissions beneficial to the human body. These emissions increase the metabolism of any living creature, accelerating coagulation and healing of wounds.The mechanism behind the effects of this artefact is still unknown. 
Mama's Beads also possess potent protective qualities: they are able to shield the body and objects from extreme heat. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
The weight is also quite high for such a small artefact, which leads to a conclusion that is of high density. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_ear_descr:
Artefact with a bizarre shape. Its core resembles a human body. Has no useful properties, Not radioactive. Valuable to collectors outside of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_electra_flash2_descr: This artefact of electrostatic nature demonstrates the ability to remove radiation from the body, also slightly improves muscle tone. Has no negative properties.
en.st_af_electra_flash3_descr: Purple stone size and shape of which resembling mushroom. Moderately protects against thermal effects, slightly restores energy reserves. Radioactive.
en.st_af_electra_flash_descr:
This artefact is very similar in appearance to Moonlight and resembles a plasma globe or a plasma lamp. 
Being a powerful resistor, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. 
When worn, it is known to slightly counter harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of certain mutants. Flash acts as a powerful resistor and will absorb even lethal doses of electricity. 
However, it also hinders healing process, thus caution is advised especially when wounded or bleeding. This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_electra_moonlight2_descr: A representative of the family of electrostatic artefacts, got its name for its brightness. Has the ability to perfectly smooth out electric field voltage drops. Radioactive.
en.st_af_electra_moonlight_descr:
This unique electrostatic artefact can resonate under the influence of psy-waves. Stalkers have learned to fine-tune the artefact so that it resonates in opposite phase to the main source of emissions, thus significantly neutralizing their effects. This orb of considerable beauty also increases electrical protection by reducing conductivity in the body when exposed to high levels of electricity. 
It should be noted that Moonlight will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_electra_sparkler2_descr: Common representative of the family of electrostatic artefacts. Slowly removes radiation. No negative properties.
en.st_af_electra_sparkler3_descr: Hooplike, sea wave color crystalline substance. Valuable artefact that is good at restoring organism's strength and removing radiation. Radioactive.
en.st_af_electra_sparkler_descr:
This artefact has the appearance of translucent spider webs. Just as proteinaceous spider silk, it is sticky and has properties of glue. 
It can be found most commonly in or near electro anomalies and it seems to have absorbed their certain characteristics: it is able to smooth fluctuations in electric field density and acts as a weak resistor, protecting the wearer from electricity and reducing its damaging effects. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases the corrosiveness of acids, leading to accelerated deterioration of equipment and higher damage to tissues of any living organism. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_elektron_descr:
This artefact is a product of electrical anomalies. Very heavy. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive. Very valued beyond the perimeter.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_empty_descr:
Two disks of organic formation (commonly lipids, cellulose and lignin) with nothing but empty space in between. This is due to a unique gravitation field formed in the centre that stabilise the distance between the disks. 
Any attempt to press the disks together, or pull them apart will fail due to rapid positive/negative changes in the gravitational field. As if the artefact reacts to any physical power that breaks its balance. 
Because of this mechanism, moving with an Empty is a hard task. As the gravitational field increases the density of surrounding air and slows the body down. 
The real usefulness of this effect comes to the ability to reduce friction, thus obtaining great protection against physical impacts. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_eye3_descr: A small grayish brown formation similar to a piece of dried meat. Has a hematopoietic effect. Heals the wounds and accelerates blood production. Also moderately protects against chemicals. Radioactive.
en.st_af_eye_descr:
This artefact, which resembles the human eye, considerably increases metabolism of the body, helping wounds heal quicker. Experienced stalkers say that Eye also brings luck. Irrespective of the validity of that statement, its positive effects are indeed quite potent. 
This artefact soothes the pain and is extremely useful when treating wounds. 
When worn, it is known to slightly counter harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of certain mutants. 
These beneficial qualities, however, come at a price. This artefact is extremely dangerous when exposed to chemical anomalies as it amplifies their toxicity and increases their potency. It is hence highly recommended to keep the artefact in your backpack, never on the body, when exploring toxic areas unless you have a death wish. 
The artefact is also known colloquially as "copper eye" as it conducts electricity and amplifies its dangerous effects in the same way as copper does. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_fire3_descr: A large rainbow substance of irregular shape with numerous tentacles and frequent weak multicolored lights flickering. Valuable artefact, quickly heals wounds.
en.st_af_fire_descr:
This artefact forms in areas of high thermal activity. Produces powerful infrared emissions which intensify metabolic processes, healing wounds before its bearer's very eyes. 
Its healing capabilities are even stronger than in case of the Eye as stalkers in possession of this artefact are said to have survived being wounded by chimeras. Thanks to that, it has earned the reputation of a miraculous artefact. 
Many stalkers owe it their lives, and most veteran mutant hunters carry it in case they run into danger. However, it shares not only positive but also negative properties of its cousin: entering a psy-field with this artefact on the belt is suicide. It will absorb psy energy and emitting it at a considerable rate. 
Also, it is highly advised to proceed with caution when planning to bring the artefact to the market as prolonged exposure to even minimal amounts of radioactive materials can result in death of the user. 
It can also be used as a reusable medkit of sorts since it heals wounds very quickly. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_fire_loop_descr:
A necessary condition for the generation of this artefact is the close impact of a thermal anomaly. It has a bizarre appearance and is therefore appreciated by collectors. Not radioactive, Has no useful properties.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_fireball2_descr: Despite the name, which fully reflects the nature of this artefact, the orb can be easily kept in hand without fear of getting burned. Makes blood stop a little faster and possible to sit closer to the fire. Radioactive.
en.st_af_fireball3_descr: Thin golden formation of small size, practically weightless. Very valuable artefact, which brings a lot of power to the owner. Stalkers are joking that it is phoenix appeared in the Zone, who drops his feathers. Radioactive.
en.st_af_fireball_descr:
It is a spherical artefact made of red-coloured crystal, created in the Burner anomaly. 
It has an unique property: it has a constant temperature of 75 degrees Fahrenheit/24 degrees Celsius, regardless of its surroundings. This allows it to absorb heat from its vicinity and to create a little pocket around the user which prevents the flames from damaging the body. 
A dangerous effect of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies.It is quite heavy due to high density of crystal-like material. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_fonar_descr:
An artefact with electric properties. Emits some energy and glows. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive. Quite interesting for collectors.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_fountain_descr:
An anomaly of presumably gravitational nature. It does not have any useful properties, but because of it's bizarre shape it is very valued by collectors. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_full_empty_descr:
Similar to Empty, this artefact consist of two disks of organic formation connected by a unique gravitational field in between. However, the said field in Full Empty is extraordinary: all atoms entering the centre, regardless of their nature, become interactive under the unknown effects of the field. Thus releasing photons (light emitting). 
Scientists usually refer to it as the "galaxy effect", which gives the artefact an exceptional orbit of light. 
The density increment of surrounding air caused by moving is higher comparing to Empty. Because of this, the artefact will greatly hinder its holder's movement. 
Being superior artefact to Empty, the protection against physical impacts is remarkable. Some claims that Full Empty is capable of stopping 9mm bullets fired at point blank. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_fuzz_kolobok2_descr: When holding this mystery of the Zone in hands, can feel how body becomes lighter. Allows to carry much more goods, but the price for it is bleeding from punctures.
en.st_af_fuzz_kolobok3_descr: Green brittle lumps, covered by dark crust when come in contact with air. Moderately protects against psi fields, slightly increases carry weight and gradually restores health of the owner. Radioactive.
en.st_af_fuzz_kolobok_descr:
A relatively rare artefact forming in chemical areas, Kolobok is highly valued for its ability to heal most kinds of wounds and stop bleeding in a matter of minutes. 
For unknown reasons, scientists are spreading rumours among stalkers that the artefact modifies bearer's genetic code, which is unproven and should be regarded as conscious attempt at monopolizing the supply of the artefact by the scientific community. This does not, however, mean that it is completely harmless. 
One drawback of this artefact is the fact that it will interact to radioactive particles, so it is best to avoid radiation fields when in possession of the artefact, especially since its negative effects are not balanced with positive ones. It will also reduce energy recovery, which is the result of its sharp needle-like appendages. The needles cause small and quickly healing wounds which bring constant pain and itch, thus reducing stamina. 
This artefact also weakens protection against heat and acids due to its high flammability. 
Lightweight and not too much of a burden to carry around. 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_geliy_descr:
A bright (literally) representative of the family of electrostatic artefacts. It gives off a gaseous substance that has a beneficial effect on the body. Due to its high efficiency, it is in large demand.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_generator_descr:
This artefact generates weak electric currents and an electromagnetic field. It is a source of energy and therefore very much valued outside the perimeter. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_gimlet_descr:
Bowl-shaped petals of the artefact release a powerful gaseous stimulant. The result of which is a positive change in human hormones.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_glass3_descr: Artefact, form and physical properties of which resemble meringue. Slightly increases carry weight, restores strength and heals cuts. Radioactive.
en.st_af_glass_descr:
Firefly interacts with fields unknown to science, considerably speeding up regeneration of tissue and organs in living beings, as well as normalizing metabolic processes. 
This artefact can literally get a badly wounded stalker back on his feet in a matter of minutes. On the other hand, Firefly can spontaneously combust when exposed to potent radioactive sources. 
A big downside to this artefact is that it weakens the body and reduce the number of platelets in blood during heal process, thus increasing bleeding rate. 
It seems to drain stamina and decrease stamina recovery greatly as well. Some of those who used Firefly for its healing purposes have reported that they couldn't walk for hours afterwards. 
Unfortunately, Firefly is extremely rare. 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_gold_fish2_descr: Very rare artefact, which allows to take a lot of additional useful in raids equipment, but with such an artefact it is better not to get into anomalies.
en.st_af_gold_fish_descr:
Direct successor to and a superior version of Gravi artefact. As was the case with Gravi, it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who discovered its unique properties after a massive blowout/emission hit the Zone. 
Thanks to meticulous research that followed, it was established that this new artefact is produced when three Gravi artefacts interact and get sucked into one another's singularity fields. This phenomenon is extremely rare, due to which the artefact is highly valued. 
It is rumoured within Ukrainian Spetsnaz circles that in the Zone there are agents from the Ministry of Defence of the Russian Federation whose sole objective is acquiring and transporting Goldfish to specialised laboratories located outside of the Zone. 
The artefact creates a constant anti-gravitational singularity field which affects only its closest vicinity. However, some stalkers have been known to disappear for no apparent reason leaving only a Goldfish behind. 
Big downside, however, comes along with this powerful anti-gravitational field: the velocity of moving objects inside its radius will rapidly increase, causing dangerous impacts on surrounding objects, including the holder. 
 
Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_grapes_descr:
Amber-like substance of a slight greenish hue. As a result of powerful anomalies it is very heavy. Very valued by collectors. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_gravi2_descr: Average priced artefact. It well enough removes radiation and slightly lightens a backpack. Has no negative properties.
en.st_af_gravi_descr:
Gravi is formed from metallic substances exposed to prolonged gravitation. This makes it capable of sustaining an powerful anti-gravitational field, which causes it to have various properties, among others reducing weight of all objects in its close proximity. For a long time, the artefact was a mystery, and it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who first discovered that Gravi creates a minute singularity field of anti-gravitational nature, the phenomenon which occurs in intervals of 30 minutes. 
A dangerous effect of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
Another downside is that it will increase the negative effects of psy-waves and is a potent conductor. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_gubka3_descr: Rather common emerald viscous substance generated by the Jelly anomaly. When wearing this artefact, wounds are slightly healed. A little radioactive.
en.st_af_ice3_descr: It is a milky white color spiral-like substance. Moderately protects against psi exposure and restores energy.
en.st_af_ice_descr:
Also colloquially known as "Radioactive Snowflake". At first glance, this artefact resembles a white Kolobok. 
Thanks to its unique properties, the artefact can significantly increase the bearer's muscle tone, thus greatly improving stamina recovery. Due to its high radioactivity, stalkers in possession of it are sometimes jokingly referred to as "Radioactive Snowflakes". 
When faced with the decision whether to carry it on the belt during a mission, you have to carefully weigh its pros and cons: does it pay to have greater endurance and high protection against electricity at the cost of being constantly exposed to its deadly radiation? Even if you are determined to take it with you, it should be noted that it is not to be used on long excursions to the Zone. 
Snowflake, however, holds a big downside: it interacts with surrounding energy sources by absorbing and amplifying their effects. For this reason, approaching heat sources, toxic areas and psy-fields while holding this artefact is a suicide. 
It is as light as a snowflake and very easy to carry around. 
 
Radiation output is high on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_indeikam3_descr: Light gray stone, round shape, size of a goose egg. Darker color, as if painted, intricate wavy lines are drawn and points placed on it. Slightly increases maximum carried weight and heals the organism. Radioactive.
en.st_af_itcher_descr:
A formation of thermal nature. The Itcher consists of two separated layers. The surface is a hard, dense metamorphic rock with deep scars covering the entire body. Completely inactive and doesn't hold any noticeable properties. On the other hand, the soft, yellow glowing core is from unknown organic nature. It actively consumes excessive heat and remains cool at all times. 
However, it is not recommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_itching1_descr: A rare artefact. Increases body tone, but is radioactive
en.st_af_itching_low_descr: A rare artefact. Properties are virtually unstudied. Radioactive
en.st_af_joker_descr: A very rare artifact. It was believed that it was bred by scientists in some of the laboratories by crossing several artifacts. But the rumors have never been confirmed.
en.st_af_karusel_descr: All properties are unstudied. It is known to accelerate the healing process of wounds, and protects against the effects of toxins on the body. Radioactive.
en.st_af_kashtan_descr: Artefact looks like a cracked overgrown chestnut with sharp spikes. A pretty good artefact that helps in every aspect, but only just a little. No negative properties.
en.st_af_kislushka_descr:
A hollow spherical formation resembling a transparent parchment of some sorts. Covered with a layer of film, pleasant to the touch. Has no useful properties, Not radioactive. Valued by collectors.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_klaksa_descr: Born only in the Klaksa anomaly, for which it got its name. Properties are not studied. Radioactive.
en.st_af_kogot_descr:
A beautiful glass-like formation from electrostatic anomalies. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive. Has no value beyond the perimeter.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_ledenec_descr: The artifact is a stone close to granite. Occurs within gravitational fields of immense intensity. It can fully or partially protect the owner's mind from psi effects. Radioactive.
en.st_af_lifekam3_descr: Artefact, appearance and origin of which resemble another one - Black Angel. Slightly protects against psi exposures and heals wounds. Radioactive.
en.st_af_lifekam_descr: A jelly-like translucent sphere covered with a wet pellicle, warm, almost hot to touch. Increases carry weight, slightly restores strength and vitalizes the blood. No negative properties.
en.st_af_lighthouse_descr:
A clot of superdense substance. Contains valuable materials that are used in production, so there is a huge demand for it in the area unaffected by the Zone. Not radioactive, Has no useful properties.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_lobster_eyes_descr:
As the name suggests, this artefact has the shape of two eggs fused together. The outer surface is very thick, the high density of its formation might be the reason behind its deep colour. 
This artefact offers slightly more psy-protection than its cousin, Stone Flower. It resonates under the influence of psy-waves to some degree and absorbs the dangerous effect. 
Another positive property is the ability to consume excessive heat while remaining cool at all times. 
Due to its density of the surface, the Lobster Eyes is quite heavy. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_magnito_descr: A new artefact. Found in thermal structure anomalies. It has been noted to increase immunity to fire and accelerate wound healing. Radioactive.
en.st_af_mahovik_descr: A new artefact. Most often formed in gravity anomalies. Noted to make it easier to carry weight. Radioactive.
en.st_af_mayatnik3_descr: Rather rare. Can be found only in the northern regions of the Zone. If have it - can almost forget what food is. No negative properties.
en.st_af_mayatnik_descr: Rather rare. Can be found only in northern regions of the Zone. Good effect on the body as a whole. Radioactive.
en.st_af_medallion_descr:
It is a small hoop with four embedded parts of a streamlined triangular shape, which have two pairs of opposite charges arbitrarily changing their location within the design. Valued by collectors. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_medusa_descr:
Very common in the Zone. This gravitational artefact is able to slightly shield the body and objects from physical impacts. 
It will slightly protect its user against extreme heat produced respectively by fire anomalies. 
This artefact is quite heavy as the gravitational field seems to increase mass. Another downside to this artefact is that it will increase the negative effects of psy-waves and is a potent conductor. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_microb_descr: A fairly rare artifact. Its properties are not fully understood, but it has been noted that it promotes wound healing and partially removes radiation.
en.st_af_midi_descr: A rare artefact. Increases immunity to fire, and detoxifies the body. Radioactive.
en.st_af_mincer_meat2_descr: This artefact is good for long-term raids. Will less often want to eat or take a rest, but it is better not to come across controller. A little radioactive.
en.st_af_mincer_meat_descr:
This artefact has soft, porous, skin-like texture and is said to be able to compress. It resembles and acts like a sponge in this regard, but reveals its special characteristics only when exposed to certain external conditions. 
Firstly, to carry the sponge metaphor further, the pores on its surface are known to absorb small amounts of toxicity from environment. 
Secondly, the artefact slightly amplifies the damaging effects of psy-fields to living organisms by absorbing psy energy and emitting it at a small rate. 
Thirdly, Meat Chunk is also known to be a conductor of electricity much like the skin of a living creature. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_misery_bread_descr:
A piece of bread as dark as the soul of the person that left it.
 
PROPERTIES:
 •  artefact
 •  attachable
en.st_af_moh_descr:
An electric artefact. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive. Has no value.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_monolith_descr: The origins of artefacts such as this one are a mystery, as they are rarely found outside the northernmost parts of the Zone. \nThis unique artefact projects a non-contact field that inhibits nearbly anomalous phenomena. This grants the wearer a notable level of protection against most of the Zone's environmental hazards. It is also one of the few active artefacts that can be safely handled without lead containers. However, when you hold it your flesh feels dry and flaky, your bones hard and stiff, the ligaments in your joints squeaky and brittle. Thick armour or great supernatural vitality would be needed by anyone intending to wear this artefact into battle.
en.st_af_morf_descr: Unstudied, radioactive formation, born in chemical structure anomalies.
en.st_af_night_star2_descr: Rare, beautiful artefact, which provides high protection from different psi effects. Radioactive.
en.st_af_night_star_descr:
This glowing artefact can generate a local directed low-gravity field. Widely used by stalkers along with Gravi, a similar artefact, to increase maximum load. 
Due to its beautiful inner core it is highly sought after by jewellers all over the world, however it is best to proceed with caution as unskilled treatment can cause the artefact to explode with power sufficient to level a small building. It is thus highly advised to perform the polishing by means of specialised machinery, which minimises the probability of explosion. Moreover, only the outer core of the artefact emits radiation. 
Nightstar will also absorb toxic and chemical agents from the environment, which makes it a valuable artefact for artefact hunters, although the amount of toxicity absorbed is negligible. It is, however, relatively cheap and even stalkers with pretty tight budgets can afford it if opportunity to buy it arises. 
That being said, Nightstar emits odour of burning flesh when in the closest proximity of heat source. Prolonged exposure may enhance its flammability and cause it to ignite. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_oasis_heart_descr:
This artefact was found at the centre of the legendary Oasis. It appears that the Heart is a crystallised plant, which has acquired the healing properties of the Oasis. 
Not only it dramatically increases recovery rate of wounds and healing process, but also provides the body with strong source of energy. It is a true miracle. 
That being said, the Oasis is very sensitive to outer sources of energy and surrounding environment. For this reason, interacting with anomaly fields will bring death to the holder. 
 
Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_oblivion3_descr: Artefact looks like an octopus with tentacles on the sides. Provides little carry weight increase, restores strength and heals cuts. Radioactive.
en.st_af_oblivion_descr: Small, fist sized, bluish white sphere. As if made of ice with small dark blue splashes. Has beneficial effect on the body as a whole. Radioactive.
en.st_af_oko_descr: It is a translucent faded orb, blue-green on the edges, size of a fist. Center has a thick matte coloring. Restores health and protects against toxins. Radioactive.
en.st_af_oreh_descr: Another rarest of Zone's artefacts. It is a dark brown color walnut sized ball, which is why it actually got its name. Gives vigor and saturation effect to its owner. Radioactive.
en.st_af_padshi_angel_descr: A rather rare artifact, accelerates wound healing. Radioactive.
en.st_af_peas_descr:
Crescent-shaped artefact. Generates a very dim light. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive. Has some value to collectors and jewellers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_pendulum_descr: A rare artefact. Full properties have not been studied. Formed in gravitational anomalies. Known to help resist psi effects.
en.st_af_pero_descr: A very rare artifact, so many wanderers attribute its existence to baes. Has slight radiation, but increases resistance to chemical structure anomalies. In addition, if placed in a backpack, it significantly lightens the weight of the contents, almost doubling the weight.
en.st_af_pin_descr:
A small artefact formed by thermal anomalies in the Zone under extreme temperatures. The look of this artefact suggests that it was an organ of a vascular plant. Further studies showed that other organic tissues are fused deep inside. 
The stem doesn't hold any useful properties. On the contrary, the small pins reduce temperature of user's body and cool all objects in their vicinity. 
This artefact offers a slight psy-protection as it will resonate under the influence of psy-waves. On the other hand, it is not recommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_poipruz_descr: Pretty rare and expensive artefact. Great radiation remover. No negative properties.
en.st_af_propeller_descr: A new artefact. Its properties have not been fully studied yet, it is in demand among Stalkers for its ability to significantly increase the weight carried. Radioactive.
en.st_af_prujina_descr: Rare, unique artifact, increases resistance to thermal structure anomalies, promotes wound healing, radioactive, full properties not yet studied. Born in thermal anomalies.
en.st_af_pulsar_descr: Rare, unique artifact, properties poorly understood. Most often born in chemical anomalies, rumored to be in demand in the greater earth for its ability to jam radio signals.
en.st_af_quest_b14_twisted2_descr: Very rare artefact of fiery kind. Somewhat resembles a snake, hence got its name. Helps with healing wounds.
en.st_af_raibloko3_descr: It looks like a Fountain artefact, but has other properties. Slightly restores strength and health. Radioactive.
en.st_af_raibloko_descr: Iridescent apple sized sphere, which slowly rotates half a meter above the ground. It produces subtle, on the verge of audibility squeak. Increases sensitivity to thermal effects, but in return restores health, strength and heals wounds. Radioactive.
en.st_af_repei_descr:
It is quite often spawned by anomalies of a gravitational nature. It has no valuable properties, but the absence of any harmful effects on the body makes it a must-have for many stalkers. Light, and very valued by jewellers and collectors. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_ring_descr:
A very small artefact of electric nature. Difficult to spot. Consists of two ring-shaped materials of organic nature, hence the given name.
