When the Ring spins, it never stops spinning, defying the first law of thermodynamics. Scientists suggest that this artefact inherits gravitational properties from Vortex anomalies. 
The outer ring has a high-conductivity. It absorbs electrical current from relative sources then ground it in the inner ring. Despite the basic function, the mechanism behind the disappearance of electrical power inside the second ring is still unknown. 
On the other side, the Ring is flammable. Prolonged exposure may enhance its flammability and cause it to ignite. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_rusty_sea_urchin_descr: The anomaly Burnt Fuzz very rarely gives rise to this artefact. Raise the blood pressure and so, the body gets rid of a large amount of red blood cells. But along with them the stored radiation leaves the body as well. In his fundamental work titled 'Ionization and polarization of the components of rare artefacts', Sakharov noted that the content of this formation has a critical stability, and it's not realistic to create such an artefact in lab conditions in the next ten years.
en.st_af_sandstone_descr:
An artefact, which is formed in zones with extreme temperatures. Has no useful properties and Not radioactive. Does not attract collectors or jewellers, but it contains a small amount of gold, so it has some value.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_seaej_descr: Appearance really resembles hedgehog. Covered with many dull needles. Restores forces, health and heals wounds. No negative properties.
en.st_af_serofim_descr:
An artefact of electric nature. Generates a temporary gravitational field. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_signet_descr:
Some stalkers call this artefact the "Amulet". Quite useless, yet some stalkers believe that this artefact brings good luck. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_skripka_descr: Round shimmering formation with zero gravity. Violin has an exclusively aesthetic value - the artefact floats in half a meter over any surface and brightly overflows with all rainbow colors. In addition, catched by the slightest breeze, emites melodious ringing in different tones, thereby hypnotizing the owner. Also adds weight to contents of backpack, but in return gives an inflow of strength and accelerated wounds healing. Radioactive.
en.st_af_skull_miser_descr:
Very light and fragile artefact. Has absolutely no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_slizen_descr: Rare, unique and very valuable artifact, increases resistance to chemical anomalies, and removes radioactive isotopes from the body. It is born in chemical structure anomalies.
en.st_af_soul2_descr: Organic artefact with unique properties. Increases carrying capacity in uknown way, and with it you can forget what food is. Has no negative properties.
en.st_af_soul_descr:
Soul is a unique organic artefact with properties just as unique: it secretes slimy goo that dramatically increases recovery rate of wounds. Thanks to its reasonable price and attractive appearance, this artefact is a valuable collector's item. 
Applying its gooey substance to wounds will soothes the pain and speeds up healing process. \It also reduces the effects of psy-waves and their damage to one's brain. But it should be known that Soul drains power from its user. The artefact does not have high density and thus is not very heavy. 
 
Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_spaika_descr:
Looks much like a petrified formation. Is an anomaly of presumably gravitational nature. Has no useful properties, Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_sponge_descr:
Sponge has always been under debate among the Ecologists. Some suggest that this artefact is driven from basic form of organisms, while others believe its an advanced life form with self-awareness inherited from living creatures. 
Despite the theories surrounding the artefact, all can agree on one thing: it moves. The sponge sometimes tries to "grab" an object it touches. Putting it in a container might be a hard task, as if it wants to escape. 
This artefact acts as a powerful resistor and will absorb even lethal doses of electricity. On the other hand, it will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_star_phantom_descr:
Formed from an Anomaly. It is a plasma-like substance in a transparent pulsating shell. Generates a weak gravitational field. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_sun_descr:
A rare specimen that is very much appreciated by collectors. Has no useful properties, but it is an inexhaustible source of light, very heavy. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_sverlo_descr: The artefact received name for an intricately elongated cylindrical form that casts a silvery color. It has a positive effect on the whole organism. Radioactive.
en.st_af_swivel_descr: A rare artefact. Properties not studied. Formed in elemental anomalies. Radioactive.
en.st_af_tapeworm_descr:
This is pure silicon dioxide, if we exclusively take into account the atomic mass of matter. Displays strange behaviour. Has no useful properties. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_vaselisk_descr:
One of the few artefacts in the Zone, which copes well with all kinds of physical influences on its owner.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_af_vedsleza3_descr: Anomalous formation, somewhat resembling a dirty golden ring. When wearing it heals the owner a bit. A little radioactive.
en.st_af_vedsleza_descr: Pretty much common artefact in the center of Zone. Has an oblongated shape of a gingery drop with green hue. Increases resistance to electricity and restores health. Radioactive.
en.st_af_vereteno_descr: A rare, unique artifact. Has slight radiation, increases resistance to chemical structure anomalies. Full properties have not yet been studied, but it is said that the artifact promotes wound healing.
en.st_af_volchok_descr: Artifact of gravitational structure, quite rare, when worn on a belt increases the weight carried. Radioactive.
en.st_af_vyvert2_descr: The average prevalence artefact, which lightens carried weight and protects against psi fields. Radioactive.
en.st_af_vyvert3_descr: Fancy purple rounded shape crystal. Upon contact with the artefact, a person's well-being generally improves. Radioactive.
en.st_af_vyvert_descr:
This bizarrely-shaped artefact appears in places with increased gravitational activity. 
Although it appears almost organic, it is actually more similar to coral. Due to its gravitational nature, It provides protection against physical impacts as it greatly reduces the friction caused by fast objects. 
Acting as a kind of sponge that absorbs chemical and toxic elements as well, this artefact provides protection from external toxic agents as well as from chemical particles that have already made their way into the body. 
Wrenced can generate a locally directed gravity field which increases its mass. For this reason, this artefact is heavy. 
 
Radiation output is average on the artefact radiation scale.
en.st_af_wish_descr: Artefact got its name from the first stalker who found it, Sanya Philosopher. Despite the name, there is nothing unusual about it. Slightly increases carried weight, heals the owner and treats scratches. Radioactive.
en.st_af_zelonka_descr: Like the medicine of the same name, it is valued and widely used. Restores health quite well and increases protection against chemical anomalies. Despite radioactivity, many stalkers use this artefact.
en.st_af_zhelch_descr:
The artefact has a calming effect on the human nervous system. Also very valued by jewellers. Has no useful properties. Generates a very weak gravitational and electric field. Not radioactive.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  junk
  •  can not be placed in a container
en.st_akvatab_descr:
Small plastic bag with pills intended for disinfecting water containing harmful bacteria and viruses. Use two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  slow usage (dispersible tablets)
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_amk_ice_s_descr: Artefact generated by the Gravi anomaly, appearance somewhat resembles ice cream. Increases carry weight and protects against chemical anomalies. Radioactive.
en.st_amk_snezhok_descr: Small artefact, radioactive, slightly increases carried weight and protects against psi fields.
en.st_amk_yoyo_descr: Appearance resembles two mushroom heads that look absolutely the same, maybe therefore it was called so. Artefact will increase your thermal protection, and allows to carry a little more goods. Radioactive.
en.st_analgetic_descr:
Non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug from the group of phenylacetic acid derivatives. The effect of the drug dulls the user's nervous activity. Because of the huge number of side effects, such as headache, dizziness, drowsiness, and in some cases memory disorders, disorientation, irritability, it is not used for medicinal purposes in most countries. However, in the Zone it has become popular due to a side effect expressed in violation of the sensitivity of the central nervous system, which allows it to withstand severe injuries, such as gunshot and shrapnel wounds.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 2%hp on use
  •  Restores 0.05%hp/s, total 50%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  average damage resistance bonus
en.st_antibio_chlor_descr:
An antibiotic. Crystalline powder of golden yellow colour, bitter taste, soluble in water. This is one of the first open antibiotics (after penicillin).
 Chlorotetracycline hydrochloride has a bacteriostatic effect on gram-positive and gram-negative microbes, rickettsia and some large viruses.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  average increase in drowsiness
en.st_antibio_sulfad_descr:
Sulfanilamide medication, effective against gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria. It acts on pneumococci, streptococci, staphylococcus, E. coli, Klebsiella stick (Friedlander's stick), causative agents of dysentery; is less active with respect to the protein; is active against the trachoma virus (an infectious eye disease that can lead to blindness); It does not act on strains of bacteria resistant to other sulfanilamide preparations. Adverse effects include headaches, digestive disorders, skin rashes, fevers and leukopenia. The effects of the drug are long-lasting.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 1.5%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
en.st_antiemetic_descr:
Tablets coated with a shell, containing 4.6 and 10 mg of perphenazine. The drug is a neuroleptic - an antipsychotic agent that provides antiallergic, sedative, miorelaxing, antiemetic, weak anticholinergic, hypotensive and hypothermic actions. The efficacy of Etperazine is due to the blockade of D2 receptors in the mesocortical and mesolimbic systems. Rarely used in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  imported
  •  anti-inflammatory
en.st_antirad_cystamine_descr:
A substance functioning as a radioprotector, used to weaken the effects of radiation on the body. The radioprotective effect of cystamine is based on the ability to bind free radicals - ionised and excited molecules formed in tissues upon irradiation - as well as the ability of the drug to interact with certain enzymes and impart resistance to ionising radiation. The effects of cystamine do not counteract already accumulated radiation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  mild dizziness
en.st_antirad_descr:
Mexaminum radiation protection drugs are common in the Zone. When used, this drug induces contraction of peripheral blood vessels and oxygen deprivation, which serve to treat and prevent radiation exposure. The drug does not have severe side effects, although isolated cases of mild nausea, dizziness, cramps and stomach pain have been reported.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 5%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_antirad_kalium_descr:
A pharmacological compound, used in the Zone as a cheap means of countering the effects of radiation on the body. Causes numerous side effects, notably gastrointestinal tract blistering, numbness to pain and dysfunction of the thyroid gland.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 8%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  mild dizziness
en.st_axe3_descr:
Used for thousands of years for cutting wood, hacking flesh, and even as a ceremonial object, this convenient axe comes in many shapes, though always consisting of a cleaver and handle. In a place like the Zone, this axe can mean both life and death.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  melee weapon
  •  has greater reach compared to knives
  •  everyday item
en.st_axe_descr:
An axe (or ax) is an implement that has been used for millennia to shape, split and cut wood, to harvest timber, as a weapon, and as a ceremonial or heraldic symbol. The axe has many forms but generally consists of an axe head with a handle, or helve. In the Zone, the axe can ensure your survival thanks to its versatility.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  melee weapon
  •  has greater reach compared to knives
  •  everyday item
en.st_bandage_descr:
A normal elastic bandage used to stop bleeding and prevent infection of wounds. For regular bleeding, carefully apply the bandage to the wound. For arterial bleeding, urgently tie the bandage around the affected area.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  first-aid item
  •  fast usage (adhesive plaster)
en.st_beans_descr:
Canned baked beans brought from the West. These haricot beans in tomato sauce may bring back nice memories to some people.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_beer_descr:
Ukrainian beer. Another - beside vodka - popular beverage in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  imported
  •  stimulant
  •  light alcohol
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  high quality
en.st_bolt_11: Supercharger with hammer from a double-barrel shotgun [R]
en.st_bolt_12: Hammers from a hammer-type double-barrel shotgun [R]
en.st_bolt_carrier_1: Sliding bolt carrier with turning bolt lock [Russia]
en.st_bolt_carrier_10: Sliding bolt carrier with turning bolt lock [NATO]
en.st_bolt_carrier_2: Sliding bolt carrier with turning bolt lock [Russia]
en.st_bolt_carrier_3: Sliding bolt carrier with turning bolt lock [NATO]
en.st_bolt_carrier_4: Sliding bolt carrier with a locking bias
en.st_bolt_carrier_6: Sliding bolt carrier with locking bolt
en.st_bolt_carrier_7: Lever type bolt carrier with locking wedge
en.st_bottle_metal_descr:
Metal bottle containing a portion of what seems to be Zone-produced vodka. It doesn't smell right and the fumes are strong.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  strong, low quality alcohol
en.st_bread_descr:
A fine bread loaf baked by Nimble's wife living outside the Zone. It was the first commodity Nimble started to sell before his business expanded. Nowadays, he provides barkeepers with this fine bread, acting as an intermediary. After all, he has more pressing matters to attend to as he has his own company to manage.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_breadold_descr:
Crumbs of bread baked in the Great Land.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_caffeine_descr:
Caffeine and sodium benzoate which cause central nervous to work with highest effectiveness possible at a given time. Reduce sleepiness to a large degree. Take two tablets at one time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_chili_descr:
Canned chili beans imported from the West. Popular as an ingredient in some dishes in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_chocolate_descr:
Russian chocolate. Very rare in the Zone and quite valuable even though its taste is nothing special. Brings back many fond childhood memories, which may help soothe the pain of living in the harsh and unforgiving conditions of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_chocolate_p_descr:
Russian chocolate. Very rare in the Zone and quite valuable even though its taste is nothing special. Brings back many fond childhood memories, which may help soothe the pain of living in the harsh and unforgiving conditions of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_cigar1_descr:
A pack of budget, strong and very low quality cigarettes. Someone must have smoked most of them since there are only a few left. Genuine USSR flavour has been carefully preserved.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_cigar2_descr:
A pack of budget, strong and very low quality cigarettes. Someone must have smoked most of them since there are only a few left. Genuine USSR flavour has been carefully preserved.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_cigar3_descr:
A pack of budget, strong and very low quality cigarettes. Someone must have smoked most of them since there are only a few left. Genuine USSR flavour has been carefully preserved.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_cigarettes_descr:
Cigarettes imported from the West. Someone must have smoked most of them since there are only a few left. Smoking just one may stabilise your mental state and satisfies hunger a bit. They are rare in the Zone and quite valuable.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_cigarettes_lucky_descr:
Cigarettes imported from the West. Some stalkers trade them for a few rounds of ammo within their faction.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  high quality
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_cigarettes_russian_descr:
The cheapest pack of cigarettes in the Zone. Russian budget brand.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  low quality
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_cleaning_kit_r7: Medium and large caliber rifle cleaning kit
en.st_cocaine_descr:
Small aluminium case containing cocaine and the tools facilitating use. Cocaine is a powerfully addictive stimulant that drastically increases happiness, energy and alertness in the brain when taken, along with extreme irritability and paranoia leading to violent moodswings.
 
The long term effects include loss of appetite, disease vulnerability, psychosis and the erosion of mouth and lungs. For stalkers who expect to live an especially short or violent life regardless, the negatives are an acceptable tradeoff for the heigtened euphoria and combat performance granted by this drug's effects. Bandits are rumoured to be the biggest suppliers of cocaine in the Zone, with renegades being their primary customers.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Depletes 6%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  very potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_compass2_descr: This Сompass found even less often than the ordinary one. There are no negative effects on the body.
en.st_conserva_descr:
The best before date at the back of the tin can indicates that you shouldn't expect delicacies.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_corn_descr:
Canned sweet corn imported from the outside. Can be eaten as it is, but there are some who use it as a soup ingredient.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_cuban_cigar_descr:
This valuable Cuban cigar can bring you bliss for a short while, especially when you're admiring a nice sunset. Some stalkers noticed that smoking strong tobacco repels mosquitoes. Cuban cigars are considered the finest in the world. A rare commodity.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  valuable
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_drink_crow_descr: "The Beak" is a powerful mixture of Zone-produced vodka and pulverised beak of a black crow. Not every beak can be used as an ingredient, because only black male crows that have lived in the Zone for more than 15 years have mutated sufficiently. The rumour has it that such beaks contain a form of enriched protein that cleanses moderate amounts of radiation from the body. Some even say that drinking "the Beak" makes you feel like you have wings for a few seconds. On the downside, however, the taste itself is awful.\n
en.st_drug_anabiotic_descr:
An experimental drug developed by Professor Ozersky for scientific research teams working in the Zone. At its core, the drug contains tetrodotoxin, known colloquially as "zombie powder," which causes a complete shutdown of the body's central nervous system that may allow people to survive emissions outside cover. After six years worth of field tests, thoughtful stalkers know to keep a few on hand for unexpected blowouts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  zone-produced
  •  causes temporary blackout
en.st_drug_antidot_descr:
The IP2 antitoxin is a complex drug comprising several antidotes, including metoclopramidum, pyridoxine, thiamine, riboxin and other pharmaceuticals. The drug is used to inject a range of antibiotics to neutralise natural poisons, together with synthetic poison absorbers, into the bloodstream. IP2 is not particularly popular in the Zone as most stalkers rely on a gas mask and a protective suit. However, there are still those who have a few units of this antidote stashed for emergency situations. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take one capsule at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  causes dizziness
en.st_drug_booster_descr:
The main component of this product is an anabolic androgen, an artificial steroid, the chemical composition of which resembles testosterone. Often used by stalkers during long raids to reduce muscle fatigue. Significantly increases weight-carrying capacity. The effects of the drug are long-lasting.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  imported
  •  medicine
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_drug_coagulant_descr:
Ukrainian Vikasolum - an artificial equivalent of vitamin K. The main purpose of this drug is to increase blood coagulation speed. In great demand among stalkers who want slow-healing wounds and lacerations inflicted by mutants to close up faster. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  causes dizziness
en.st_drug_psy_blockade_descr:
A drug that blocks avalanche-like nerve impulses. Consumption induces short-term loss of all emotion. Used exclusively in the Zone to counteract the effects of anomalous psy-fields. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  causes extreme dizziness
en.st_drug_radioprotector_descr:
B190 Indraline radioprotectant, included in medkits issued to nuclear power plant personnel. Used in the Zone instead of the excessively toxic PC1 cysteamine hydrochloride, repeated use of which often caused death. Reduces the effects of gamma radiation on live tissue. Best consumed before exposure, as effects are not instant, but the drug lasts a long time. Take one capsule at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  mild dizziness
en.st_ecologist_outfit_blue_description: High quality modified SSP-99 suit. It provides increased body protection from bullet and splinter damage. It is designed for the guards working with scientific expeditions. The Sapphire model provides excellent protection against psi exposure. It provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments and other effects dangerous to the body.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_grn_description: High quality modified SSP-99 suit. It provides increased body protection from bullet and splinter damage. It is designed for the guards working with scientific expeditions. It provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments and other effects dangerous to the body.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_orange_description: A SSP-99 chemical protection suit specially designed for the Zone conditions. It is used by scientific expeditions and the eco-stalkers who cooperate with them. It has an integrated air-filtering and air-conditioning system. It is heat and electricity resistant, provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments. It is not designed for combat, so it provides neither bullet, nor splinter protection.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_red_description: High quality modified SSP-99 suit. It provides increased body protection from bullet and splinter damage. It is designed for the guards working with scientific expeditions. The ‘Ruby’ model gives excellent protection against mutant attacks, as well as a wound healing system integrated in the suit. It provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments and other effects dangerous to the body.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_white_description: A SSP-99 chemical protection suit specially designed for the Zone’s harsh conditions. It is used by scientific expeditions and the eco-stalkers who cooperate with them. It has an integrated air-filtering and air-conditioning system, thus providing excellent protection from radiation. The Diamond variant gives superior protection from electricity. Also has an integrated system for suppressing anomalies’ activity, which provides an average protection against chemicals and high temperatures. It is not designed to conduct military operations, therefore it doesn’t provide any protection from bullets or from shrapnel.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_outfit_yello_description: A SSP-99 chemical protection suit specially designed for the Zone conditions. It is used by scientific expeditions and the eco-stalkers who cooperate with them. The Topaz model provides excellent protection against radiation. It has an integrated air-filtering and air-conditioning system. It is heat and electricity resistant, provides good protection from radiation and biological anomalies. It is resistant to chemically aggressive environments. It is not designed for combat, so it provides neither bullet, nor splinter protection.\n \n
en.st_ecologist_report_1_of_3_name: Walking Dead Findings field report 39B rev. 2 (part 1 of 3)
en.st_ecologist_report_2_of_3_name: Walking Dead Findings field report 39B rev. 2 (part 2 of 3)
en.st_ecologist_report_3_of_3_name: Walking Dead Findings field report 39B rev. 2 (part 3 of 3)
en.st_energy_drink_descr:
Often used by stalkers on long trips due to its exhilarating effect when you're tired. The drink also sobers you up a bit if you're drunk as well as induces the release of adrenaline into the bloodstream. Do not overdose.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  imported
  •  stimulant
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_flask_descr:
Military flasks are intended for storing small amounts of water. Prepared by medics and scientists. First, the water - combined with a special type of alcohol - is boiled at a very high temperature for purification and disinfection. Afterwards, it is cooled in refrigerators, to which it owes its refreshing "spark." The end result is water that is completely radiation-free. If in spite of the above, you still have doubts concerning its purity, you can always use akvatab. Due to the cost of production, military flasks are in a limited supply and are sold at a moderate price. Medics also have them in stock, but they're slightly more expensive as they include the cost of transportation.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_gas_tube_10: Ejector from an over-under double barrel shotgun [R]
en.st_glucose_descr:
Glucose shots are used in cases of severe diabetic hypoglycaemia, but can also be employed as a stimulant. Instant induction of carbohydrates entails a rapid boost of energy, thus allowing the user to undertake increased physical effort and withstand stress. Due to its convenient means of administration, they can be used in combat situations. This makes glucose shot a very good way to speed-up the healing process.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_glucose_s_descr:
Glucose shots are used in cases of severe diabetic hypoglycaemia, but can also be employed as a stimulant. Instant induction of carbohydrates entails a rapid boost of energy, thus allowing the user to undertake increased physical effort and withstand stress. Due to its convenient means of administration, they can be used in combat situations. This makes glucose shot a very good way to speed-up the healing process.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_grenade_f1_descr:
A defensive hand grenade, with fragments capable of piercing medium level body armour. The grenade has an approximately 4 metre kill radius. Stalkers get F1 grenades from trading with the military, who write them off as having been used for fighting mutants.
 
  •  Blast power: high
  •  Blast radius: 4.2 m
  •  Fragments' radius: 48 m
  •  Av. number of fragments: 380 (small shrapnels)
  •  Explosion delay: ~4 seconds
en.st_grenade_launcher_descr:
A single shot, front loaded, rifled underbarrel grenade launcher for assault rifles made in Warsaw Pact countries. Designed to greatly expand fire-power of a basic infantry squad. The firing mechanism is self-cocking, with a manual safety catch and automatic shot prevention if incorrectly installed onto a rifle.
 
  •  muzzle velocity: ~76 m / sec
  •  fire range: ~300 m
  •  reload time: slow
  •  ammunition: VOG-25 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_l85_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  L85
 
 The M320 under-barrel grenade launcher developed by Heckler & Koch in 2008 to replace the M203 grenade launcher.
  •  ammunition: M203 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_m203_descr:
A modified M203 grenade launcher whose length has been decreased by three inches, and which can be attached to weapons by means of a Picatinny rail. Thanks to a changed mount, this grenade launcher is widely used around the world and can be installed on most currently produced rifles. Although of more modern design, it has almost the same properties as its Soviet counterpart - the GP-25 grenade launcher.
 
  •  muzzle velocity: ~76 m / sec
  •  fire range: ~300 m
  •  reload time: slow
  •  ammunition: M203 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_monolit_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  AK-12 Monolith with Tactical Kit installed on it.
 
 30mm light grenade launcher, developed by the designers of the Monolithh faction, based on the special silent 6G17 Canaryka grenade launcher.
  •  ammunition: VOG-30 30mm grenade
en.st_grenade_launcher_scar_descr:
COMPATIBILITY:
 
 •  FN SCAR
 
 40mm grenade launcher developed by the Belgian company FN Herstal for the FN SCAR assault rifle
  •  ammunition: M203 40mm grenade
en.st_grenade_rgd5_descr:
An offensive hand grenade with a small kill zone of about 3 metres. Often used by stalkers to "smoke out" mutants due to its relatively low cost.
 
  •  Blast power: medium
  •  Blast radius: 3,2 m
  •  Fragments' radius: 43 m
  •  Av. number of fragments: 240 (small shrapnels)
  •  Explosion delay: ~4 seconds
en.st_grenade_smoke_descr: A hand smoke grenade. Used to put up smoke screens. Once the grenade is thrown it takes 10 seconds for the smoke screen to expand.
en.st_grenade_thermite_descr:
An incendiary grenade (or thermite grenade) that produces intense heat (2,200 °C or 3,992 °F) by means of a chemical reaction in which powdered aluminium and iron oxide react to produce a stream of molten iron and aluminium oxide. Filled with 600 to 800 grams of thermite.
 
  •  Blast power: medium (thermal damage)
  •  Blast radius: 4.6 m
  •  Fragments' radius: none
  •  Av. number of fragments: none
  •  Explosion delay: ~4 seconds
en.st_hand_rolling_tobacco_descr:
Precious hand-rolling tobacco, imported from the West. With no additional ingredients, so it's possible to enjoy the original taste of tobacco leaf itself.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  slow usage (roll up)
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  high quality
en.st_helm_bandana_descr: An ordinary fabric bandana worn by conscripts, support corps and rear-echelon troops in the Military. Normally worn on the head, soldiers will often drape it around their mouth and nose instead to avoid breathing in toxic or radioactive particles. While better than nothing, this obviously isn't very effective, and bandanas used this way need frequent replacement.\n \n
en.st_helm_battle_descr: An aluminium/titanium helmet with a cloth exterior for camouflage. Comes with pockets that can be filled with additional armour pieces. This helmet is in common use among Military Stalkers and Spetsnaz, who typically use it in tandem with PSZ-series body armour. Overall, the M12 Sphere Helmet provides some of the best combat-oriented protection in the Zone, and is in demand among any wealthy stalker who expects to get caught in a serious battle.\n \n
en.st_helm_cloth_mask_descr: A simple piece of cloth, folded into a mask. It is often used by stalkers to prevent dangerous particles from entering the body, as a precautionary measure. However, with prolonged use, it can accumulate toxins, so it is always desirable to have a spare for a quick replacement.\n \n
en.st_helm_exo_descr: This helmet resembles that of an ordinary exoskeleton, but differs slightly from its standard counterpart and has differing protective characteristics. Good protection from gunfire and high calibre rounds in combination with anomaly protection make this helmet one of the best in its category.\n \n
en.st_helm_hardhat_descr: A desperately outdated steel army helmet with a retractable visor for the eyes and not much else. Provides negligible protection against anomalies or radiation, but can deflect bullets. This helmet was never particularly popular in the Zone, except for use in brief armed conflicts between factions.\n \n
en.st_helm_m40_descr: This M40 is equipped with a multilayered 40-millimetre breathing filter placed on the left. This mask provides respectable radiation and chemical protection for extended periods, even after suffering damage. This gas mask is mass-produced for the US Armed Forces, and finds great use among Mercenaries.\n \n
en.st_helm_metro_descr: Believed to have first been created by a faction known as "Final Day", this helm resembles a Czech M10 Gas Mask with heavy armour plating modifications. While it is uncomfortably heavy for most, it still boasts good protective characteristics versus chemical, radioactive and physical threats. When Final Day's leaders were assassinated and the faction dissolved by a stalker named Ghost, these helmets gradually entered into circulation among well-heeled stalkers, particularly those who intended to raid the myriad underground labs across the Zone.\n \n
en.st_helm_protective_descr: An uncomfortable but high quality curtain helmet made by the same Defense Research Institute as the SEVA bodysuit. Has a hermetic design, and allows for complete isolation from the conditions of an anomalous environment. It is intended to be used in tandem with military suits for the purpose of operations in highly anomalous areas.\n \n
en.st_helm_resp_descr: A basic plastic and rubber respirator, used to protect the wearer from inhaling harmful dusts, fumes, vapours or gases. Widely used by rookies and even some veterans from all factions due to its light weight and economical environmental protection. However, it provides negligible physical protection and is practically guaranteed to fail in more heavily irradiated areas.\n \n
en.st_helm_respirator_descr: A ShMB gas mask refitted with external 40mm filters for greater functionality. Because the process of conversion from the old internal "porkchop" filters was never standardized, however, there is some slight variance in weight and radiological protection between individual masks. As a general rule, masks like this offer respectable protection in areas of increased radioactive activity, but suffer from a high failure rate in toxic environments and have negligible protection against physical impacts, rapidly breaking when placed under such conditions.\n \n
en.st_helm_respirator_gp5_descr: Originally manufactured from 1962 to 1989, the GP-5 gas mask was built with the intention to protect the Soviet people from radioactive fallout. It is a helmet-mask made of white and black rubber, with the lenses held in place by a crimping rim. The filters, however, have been restored or replaced with a great deal of care. Compared to gas mask kits of similar price and availability, such as the PBF, this reconditioned respiratory device boasts greater protection against radiation, but an even greater failure rate in toxic environments. \n \n
en.st_helm_rp_bala_descr: A regular black fabric balaclava. It'll help keep your face warm in Eastern Europe's frigid winters, if nothing else. While the cloth of the mask does help filter some toxic and radioactive particles from the air you breathe, this protection is unreliable at best, and balaclavas used this way will soon need to be replaced.\n \n
en.st_helm_tactic_descr: A modern, high quality helmet with a built-in air filtration system, with features based on Western models. The design consists of several layers of Kevlar to protect the wearer from severe physical harm. The helmet is also made of composite dielectric materials, thereby granting the wearer greater insulation from shock than most similar models. Most commonly used by the Zone's Spetsnaz operators, especially in conjunction with the PS5 body armour series.\n \n
en.st_ied_descr:
Improvised explosive device produced from various chemical substances, with a broken electrical igniter and in steel ball container. Chemicals used in the device produce intense odour and are heavily toxic. This IED is significantly more powerful than a more common OG-7V version. In the Zone, IEDs are quite popular and Zoners use them for a variety of purposes, from gaining access to closed areas to ambushes. They are also often placed next to mines to greatly amplify the explosion's power. IED can be effectively concealed making it virtually invisible to everyone else.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  military item
  •  unnoticeable when placed on ground
  •  triggering mechanism: proximity
  •  blast power: very high
  •  blast radius: 12.9 m
  •  fragments radius: 74 m
  •  av. number of fragments: 580 (steel balls)
  •  explosion delay: none
en.st_ied_rpg: Improvised explosive device (based on OG-7V warhead)
en.st_ied_rpg_descr:
Improvised explosive device based on OG-7V warhead and parts of a car battery. It looks like it has been carried around for quite some time and could go off any second. Fortunately, the triggering mechanism ensures that it won't unless the explosive is directly hit by a bullet or subjected to other potent physical force. In the Zone, IEDs are quite popular and Zoners use them for a variety of purposes, from gaining access to closed areas to ambushes. They are also often placed next to mines to greatly amplify the power of explosion. IED can be effectively concealed making it virtually invisible to everyone else.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  military item
  •  unnoticeable when placed on ground
  •  triggering mechanism: proximity
  •  blast power: high
  •  blast radius: 7.8 m
  •  fragments' radius: 56 m
  •  av. number of fragments: 440 (shrapnel)
  •  explosion delay: none
en.st_jgut_descr:
A haemostatic rubber tourniquet, allowing the user to stop bleeding.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  first-aid item
  •  fast usage (tourniquet)
en.st_joint_descr:
Known for their relaxing effects, joints are used by stalkers recreationally, especially those who frequent the Barrier or the Red Forest beyond it. Induces a soothing effect if combined with alcohol. Increases hunger.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  zone-produced
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
en.st_knife_6x4_descr:
Soviet-Polish bayonet first adopted in 1972 for use with AK rifles. Although highly durable, it is much better at thrusting than it is at chopping or slashing.
 
  •  unsuitable for chopping thick-skinned mutants
en.st_knife_combat_descr: \n \nA large multi-purpose knife with a rugged rubber handle, commonly used by US soldiers since 1986. Sharp and well maintained. Although it's inconvenienced when facing heavily protected opponents, its toothed blade is ideal for causing massive, bleeding wounds to softer targets. This is makes it a perfect choice for finishing off wounded animals, or silently getting the drop on light infantry.
en.st_knife_hunting_descr: \n \nA modern, highly durable hunting knife with a large blade of stainless steel. Ideal for field dressing the meat off larger animals with thick hides. It is also able to cause massive, bleeding wounds to exposed flesh. As it wasn't intended for use in battle, it struggles against combat armours.
en.st_knife_needle_descr:
A combat knife, based on designs first adopted by the Soviet Army in WWII. It is technically surplus, and isn't officially used by any modern army.
 
This weapon consists of a 152 mm blade with a clip point, a large choil, a black wooden handle, and an S-shaped guard. The guard is "inverted" because standard Soviet Army grips frequently called for holding the knife with the edge facing upwards. The handle is enforced with rugged fabric for a good grip.
 
Although a good combat knife for its time, in the Zone its cutting power is suitable only for utility purposes or for finishing off already helpless opponents. Its piercing power, however, is something to be feared: it is easy to angle this blade's deadly point between the gaps of even modern combat armours.
 
  •  unsuitable for chopping thick-skinned mutants.
en.st_knife_swat_descr: A well-kept blade, ideal for special forces operators participating in surgical strikes. Rumoured to have averted several nuclear incidents during the Cold War. It is a deadly weapon and the only knife in the Zone that is relatively good at both piercing armours and dealing massive tissue damage. The ultimate combat cutlery.
en.st_knifebf4_descr: The OTs-04 knife was developed at the Tula Central Design Research Bureau (TsKIB) in the late 80s - early 90s and was intended for special forces of the Interior Ministry troops.
en.st_kolbasa_descr:
A package containing a meal of old bread and some smelly meat of unknown origin wrapped in brown paper. The look and smell suggest that some of it is moldy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  low quality
en.st_kukri_descr: This is a special blade made of high-carbon spring-spring steel of the bus, which for many years stood in an anomal field, and therefore has excellent cutting and chopping properties. Ideal for cutting mutants of all stripes, and for protection against them.
en.st_marijuana_descr:
Self-grown cannabis. Smoking it is a popular pastime, especially among Freedomers who've served at the Barrier. Marijuana bags can be bought here and there in the Zone. Some believe that the drug helps retain a balance of the mind.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  slow usage (prolonged inhalation)
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
en.st_meat_bloodsucker_descr:
A small hot meal made from bloodsucker meat spiced with chilies and mixed with mushrooms.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_boar_descr:
A small portion of boar meat, grilled and seasoned with salt and mixed with peppers. The most popular warm meal among stalkers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_chimera_descr:
A portion of grilled chimera meat, served with mushrooms and spices. An expensive meal, eaten most commonly by veteran Stalkers to celebrate accomplishment of difficult missions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_dog_descr:
A small hot meal of grilled dog chops mixed with garlic, peppers and mushrooms. A cheap alternative to the more popular boar beef.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_flesh_descr:
Slices of fat and greasy bacon made from mutated pigs commonly known as fleshes.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_lurker_descr:
A small portion of lurker meat, grilled and seasoned with salt and mixed with peppers. Good nutrition value due to thick muscles of the mutant.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_pseudodog_descr:
Portion of grilled pseudodog meat chops. Good nutrition value due to thick muscles of the animal.
 
 PROPERTIES:

 PROPERTIES:
en.st_meat_snork_descr:
Grilled snork hand, ready to be eaten. WARNING: Most Zoners consider eating snork's meat cannibalistic and immoral. However, certain factions, such as bandits and mercenaries, include it in their meals so as to show their superiority over other groups.

en.st_meat_tushkano_descr:
2 small skewered tushkanos, grilled and seasoned with salt and chili pepper. The cheapest hot meal available in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_medkit_army_descr:
A specialised medical kit for providing first aid to combat casualties. The kit includes blood coagulants based on menadione, painkillers, antibiotics and immunostimulants, as well as a kit for removing bullets and fragments from the body. This medkit is issued primarily to army personnel such as Spetsnaz units venturing deep into the Zone and is popular among Duty forces.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 3%hp/s, total 100%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military item
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_medkit_descr:
A general purpose medical kit. Handy for treating injuries, wounds, chemical and thermal burns and various types of poisoning.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 1.8%hp/s, total 60%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_medkit_science_descr:
A medical kit designed specifically for use in the Zone. The kit contains products for handling wounds, as well as preventing the development of radiation poisoning and reducing accumulated radiation in the body. Contains Vikasolum, Batilolum and Naphazoline, unlike other medkits.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 3%hp/s, total 100%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  valuable
  •  high quality
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_mine_descr:
PFM-1 (short for противопехотная фугасная мина; NATO name: "Green parrot") used to be a standard-issue anti-personnel mine of the Red Army, employed mainly during the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan. Its widespread utilisation during the conflict led to high civilian casualties, especially among children, since randomly scattered mines were often mistaken for toys due to their familiar shape and colour. For this reason, the PFM-1 earned a sinister nickname: "Child killer." Since then, the mine has been replaced by newer models. However, as was the case with a variety of other 'retired' weaponry, a large number of these mines has somehow made its way into the Zone, becoming its primary booby-trap explosive. The mine is highly valued mainly for its functionality, user-friendliness, compact size and low weight, while its main drawback is a relatively small amount of explosive material: its power is often insufficient to kill a heavily armoured stalker with a single blast. For this reason, the mine should be used in combination with other explosive materials and it acts as an igniter. If it is not armed, the mine will not detonate, even when hit with a gun.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  explosive
  •  military item
  •  anti-personnel mine
  •  triggering mechanism: pressure
  •  blast power: small
  •  blast radius: 2.2 m
  •  fragments' radius: none
  •  av. number of fragments: none
  •  explosion delay: none
en.st_mineral_water_descr:
Mineral water from Ukrainian springs. Carbonated and with additional calcium.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  high quality
  •  mild alcohol sobering effect
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_mint_descr:
Mint-flavoured altoids imported from the West. They are highly refreshing and remove radiation particles from the mouth. They also seem to reduce sleepiness for a short while. You can take as many as 10 mints at a time but that's only because your mouth isn't able to fit any more.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_morphine_descr:
An iron ampoule designed as field equipment for military field personnel for instant pain reduction. This ampoule contains a powerful dose of morphine. In clinical medicine, morphine is regarded as the gold standard of opioid analgesics used to relieve severe or agonizing pain and suffering. Like other opioids, such as oxycodone, hydromorphone, and diacetylmorphine (heroin), morphine acts directly on the central nervous system (CNS) to relieve pain. Injected into an arm or a thigh.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 10%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  large damage resistance bonus
en.st_mre_descr:
The Meal, Ready-to-Eat (commonly known as the MRE) is a self-contained, individual field ration in lightweight packaging, developed by the United States military for its service members for use in combat or other field conditions where organised food facilities are not available. One MRE can be used as one meal. The packaging of an MRE is designed to withstand rough conditions and exposure to the elements. Contains one course along with a variety of other food and drink items. While it can be eaten cold, it usually tastes much better when heated up with the included flameless ration heater (FRH, a water-activated exothermic reaction device that emits heat).
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military ration

  •  high quality
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  3 portions in one package. 1398 kcal in total
en.st_nuts_descr:
Assorted peanuts, hazelnuts, cashews and almonds in a nice and popular blend. Nutrition value is quite high. Imported from South Africa.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_oasis_heart2_descr: Apparently, it is a crystallized plant, has beneficial effect on the body as a whole. No negative properties.
en.st_protein_descr:
This bar provides the body with necessary proteins and sugars which give you a welcome boost. Useful on longer trips when you're on the go and need to eat something fast.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  high quality

en.st_ration_ru_descr:
Breakfast, dinner and supper all in one package. Includes various food items whose function is to provide the body with all minerals and microelements essential for your health as well as cooking equipment (small metal frame, fuel tablets, matches, striker) and other items (e.g. napkins) facilitating use in field conditions. Comes with a polymeric box that protects the ingredients from hazardous environmental conditions. The polymeric box has 3 sections, each respectively for breakfast, dinner and supper.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military ration
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  7 portions in one package. 3661 kcal in total
en.st_ration_ukr_descr:
This Ukrainian combat ration is based on a previous Russian version, and comprises commercially available cans and dried food items packed together in a sectioned box (resembling a takeout tray) made of very thin green plastic. Contains all that is necessary to provide a healthy adult with all calories and minerals needed during a single day.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  military ration
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  6 portions in one package. 3186 kcal in total
en.st_rebirth_descr:
Warning! Do not use in combination with any other drug as this may prove lethal. This powerful mixture contained in a small syringe will make you lose consciousness. But when you wake up (if you wake up), you will feel reborn. Inject the syringe into your thigh when sitting down.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 22.5%hp/s, total 190%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  clean nutrition source
  •  causes temporary blackout
en.st_repair_kit_r7: Medium and large caliber rifle fixing kit
en.st_salicidic_acid_descr:
An iron ampoule designed as field equipment for military field personnel for instant pain reduction. It contains a powerful dose of metamizole mixed with an antihemorrhagic drug. Metamizole is one of the strongest Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drugs (NSAIDs), especially effective at easing aches and pains as well as reducing fevers. It is also useful as anti-inflammatory drug when used in higher doses. May cause some delayed side effects such as leucopenia or agranulocytosis, so it should be used with moderation. Injected into an arm or a thigh. Its availability in the Zone is limited due to the difficulty of smuggling the medicine across military cordons.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 10%hp on use
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  moderate damage resistance bonus
en.st_salmon_descr:
Ukrainian smoked salmon. As soon as it's brought to the Zone, the fish changes hands until it finds its way to the highest bidder. Very valuable.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_sausage_descr:
Made of beef and pork. Smoked and vacuum packaged, it can be preserved for long periods of time. This particular piece has been imported from the Russian Federation. Famous among certain Russian mafia leaders for its exceptional flavour and taste.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_sleepingpills_descr:
A package of alprazolam 0.25 mg tablets, also known as 027 R. Alprazolam is known among chemists for its ability to reduce depression, anxiety and panic disorders. Invaluable for anyone exploring Yantar, Radar, the Red Forest or any of the underground labs. Side effects include sleepiness. Best taken with water, but some stalkers opt for caffeine instead.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  immediate sleepiness induction
en.st_stim_impro_descr:
Improvised stimpacks are popular among novice Zoners as they are easy to obtain and inexpensive. Produced in the Zone from commonly available ingredients, without proper equipment and purification. This is the cause of many side effects which include headache, paraesthesia and considerable increase in nutrition demand. Injected in the thigh.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 4.2%hp/s, total 50%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  zone-produced
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  moderate body recovery time
en.st_stim_military_descr:
Military stims constitute a part of standard-issue soldier equipment for field operations in the Zone... in theory. In practice, most grunts never see these stims. Meanwhile, they're available with suspicious ease on the black market and can be acquired by most stalkers for a moderate price. Popular among experienced Zoners. They are significantly more potent and faster working than their improvised counterparts, which makes them perfect for use in life-threatening situations. Produced from raw agents of high density which can take their toll on the body. Side effects include extreme dizziness and increased hunger.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 6%hp/s, total 90%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  military item
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  fast body recovery time
en.st_stim_scientic_descr:
Created by the same defence research institute in Kiev which developed the well-known SEVA suit, this state-of-the-art solution constitutes the most potent health stabiliser available in the Zone. Best quality ingredients and perfected formula enable almost instant recuperation and ensure prompt radiation cleansing. Side effects are minimised. Extremely high cost practically limits the target group of the drug to most skilful and successful stalkers.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 6%hp/s, total 90%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  high quality
  •  fast usage (syringe)
  •  rapid body recovery time
en.st_survival_kit_descr:
Survival kit containing fabric, sewing needles and a few leather strips. Primarily used as a means to stop the bleeding and treat lacerations, in the hands of a skilled user this small survival kit may prove essential during prolonged excursions in the Zone. It can also be utilized for outfit repairs of even most severe damage.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 3.6%hp/s, total 162%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  everyday item
  •  high quality
  •  slow usage (field kit)
  •  immediately stops heavy bleeding
  •  prolonged body recovery time
en.st_tactical_knife_descr: [RUSSIAN ACCENT "ON"] It is rumoured, these blades are produced in very a few by masters from a groupment Monolithh. Threw composition of alloy not known - it is talked to extract him it is possible only in the heart of sarcophagus.[RUSSIAN ACCENT "OFF"]
en.st_tea_descr:
Beard's popular hot tea made from a mixture of sugar, edible dried mushrooms and boiled water that is said to be radiation-free. Stalkers who can afford to buy the drink often take it for long trips in the Zone. It's a good and healthy way to stay on your toes when you're getting tired or when you're out exploring on cold nights.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  drink
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_tetanus_descr:
Tetanus vaccine is composed of inactivated tetanus toxin and is used to prevent an individual from contracting tetanus. Tetanus, also known as lockjaw, is a disease caused by the bacteria Clostridium tetani which enter the body through open wounds and release a poison called tetanospasmin. Tetanus is a potentially deadly disease because the poison attacks the nervous system blocking nerve signals from the spinal cord to and from the muscles. Animals and mutants alike are prone to carry Clostridium tetani which can be transferred through bites. Injection of inactivated toxin enhances your immunological system and can lead to several positive side-effects. Moreover, this vaccine has been supplemented with several additional anti-toxins making it usable for purposes other than preventing contraction of tetanus.
 
 HEALING:
  •  Restores 0.06%hp/s, total 26.5%
 PROPERTIES:
  •  medicine
  •  imported
  •  fast usage (syringe)
en.st_tobacco_descr:
Cigarettes are expensive and rare in the Zone, and having raw tobacco enables you to produce your own cigs at a lower cost. This tin is sealed, which ensures that the tobacco will stay fresh for days or weeks depending on the conditions it's kept in.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  stimulant
  •  slow usage (roll up)
  •  potent alcohol sobering effect
  •  low quality
en.st_tomahawk_descr: Tactical tomahawk, multitool and breaching tool, all-in-one solution.
en.st_tomato_descr:
Canned, sliced and diced tomatoes are imported to the Zone on a regular basis. The best before date on the bottom suggests they're still fresh.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source
en.st_trigger_components_2: Double fire mode trigger mechanism with hammer
en.st_trigger_components_3: Triple fire mode trigger mechanism with hammer
en.st_trigger_components_4: Single fire mode trigger mechanism with firing pin
en.st_trigger_components_5: Double fire mode trigger mechanism with firing pin
en.st_tushonka_descr:
Tushonka is a common name of canned, stewed meat produced in the Soviet Union and other Warsaw Pact countries. The irony is that the idea originally came to Russia in a form of World War II aid transports from the United States. Since then, various kinds of tushonkas have become a primary means of long-time meat preservation, used both by the civilian population and as a standard-issue Red Army food ration. Despite their long expiry date, tushonkas are known for their high nutrition value (mostly owing to high fat content) and a relatively good taste. The Chernobyl Exclusion Zone has seen hundreds of types and tastes of tushonkas. In the spring of 2013 'Abakan' minced-meat brand remains the unquestionable king, and certainly the Zone has seen worse than that.
 
 PROPERTIES:
  •  food
  •  imported
  •  clean nutrition source

en.st_up_add_a2_descr: Installation of a mount for attachment of an optical scope.
en.st_up_add_a3_descr: Installation of a mount for attachment of an underbarrel grenade launcher.

en.st_up_add_b2_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.

en.st_up_add_b7_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.
en.st_up_armor_1_descr: Reinforced plates that last longer, but are not more durable.
en.st_up_armor_2_descr: Polycarbonate plates don't last long, but they're more reliable than Kevlar thanks to improved bullet impulse negation.
en.st_up_armor_3_descr: Armour with an inner layer that spreads impact over a greater area.
en.st_up_armor_4_descr: Mobile plates protect joints from gunshot wounds.
en.st_up_armor_4_name: Installation of mobile protective plates for joints
en.st_up_arty_1_descr: Installation of an armour attachment module.
en.st_up_arty_2_descr: Installation of an additional armour attachment module.
en.st_up_arty_3_descr: Installation of two-compartment armour attachment module.
en.st_up_autd_a1_descr: Adjustment of components allows the weapon to last longer without jamming.
en.st_up_autd_a2_descr: The fashion for plastic components has not only paid off, but it has also become quite a popular upgrade.
en.st_up_autd_b1_descr: A low impulse firing mechanism ensures less recoil than older versions.
en.st_up_autd_b2_descr: Thanks to firm positioning of the round as it is fired, the bullet continues on a straight path and hits the target.
en.st_up_autd_b2_name: Installation of a round positioning unit
en.st_up_autd_b3_descr: Often used in weaponry, a roller locking system reduces recoil and improves groupings.
en.st_up_autd_b3_name: Semifree bolt with a roller system
en.st_up_autd_b5_descr: A gas motor is used in self-cocking shotguns for semi-automatic fire.
en.st_up_autd_c1_descr: Protective sputter makes misfiring due to mechanism malfunction impossible.
en.st_up_autd_c2_descr: When a shot is fired, a component opens a path into the barrel and returns to the closed position by means of a lengthwise sliding movement of the foregrip.
en.st_up_autd_c4_descr: A unified blowback module is one of the best technological solutions for reducing recoil.
en.st_up_autd_c5_descr: An automatic driving rod improves a weapon's precision.
en.st_up_autd_c5_name: Installation of an automatic driving rod
en.st_up_auth_a1_descr: An active counter-weight moves from the bolt frame, partially compensating for recoil.
en.st_up_auth_b1_descr: Installation of additional roller parts reduces recoil.
en.st_up_auth_b1_name: Installation of a blowback roller compensation system
en.st_up_auth_c1_descr: Replacement of the weapon's bolt mechanism with a more suitable design, which improves the rate of fire.
en.st_up_auth_c2_descr: When the weapon is fired, the bolt frame counter-weight moves in the opposite direction to the bolt, which allows for more comfortable firing of the machine gun.
en.st_up_auto_a1_descr: A counter-weight is installed as an additional component into the receiver to reduce recoil by means of counter force.
en.st_up_auto_a2_descr: The fashion for polymer components has not only paid off, but it has also become quite a popular upgrade.
en.st_up_auto_a2_name: Impact-resistant polymer components for automatic elements
en.st_up_auto_b1_descr: Installation of a special mechanism to protect the weapon from dirt.
en.st_up_auto_b2_descr: A special component seals the barrel in an airtight manner to increase pressure when a shot is fired.
en.st_up_auto_b2_name: Installation of a barrel closing device
en.st_up_auto_b3_descr: Synchronization is achieved by means of a cog, which allows flatness to be increased.
en.st_up_auto_b4_descr: A component installed on the rear side of the receiver that reduces bolt speed. Installed to improve effectiveness of aimed fire.
en.st_up_auto_c1_descr: A special component installed into the bolt mechanism to soften bolt movement and reduce recoil.
en.st_up_auto_c1_name: Addition of a blowback speed reduction device
en.st_up_auto_c2_descr: An integrated improvement that is normally used for sniper rifles in view of the considerable increase in the weapon's weight.
en.st_up_auto_c3_descr: Installation of a mechanism with mobile components that increase round feeding speed when the weapon is fired.
en.st_up_auto_c4_descr: Upgrade of the weapon's automatic components that requires a number of parts to be replaced. Improves accuracy.
en.st_up_auto_c5_descr: A synthetic component immediately in front of the bolt movement area, which compresses it significantly to improve firing accuracy.
en.st_up_auto_c6_descr: A link fixes the position of the barrel and if the barrel moves, additional compensation holes are opened.
en.st_up_auts_a1_descr: Modernization that allows the trigger mechanism to be smoother, which is important for snipers.
en.st_up_auts_a1_name: Installation of a trigger release regulation mechanism
en.st_up_auts_a2_descr: This component allows the shooter to get a feel for the moment at which the shot is fired, improving firing accuracy.
en.st_up_auts_a2_name: Installation of an advance notice trigger
en.st_up_auts_b1_descr: Often used in Western weaponry, a roller locking system reduces recoil and improves groupings.
en.st_up_auts_b1_name: Semifree bolt with a roller system
en.st_up_auts_b2_descr: A special mechanism takes on some of the impact during firing, which makes shooting the weapon more comfortable.
en.st_up_auts_b3_descr: As sniper rifles are more demanding in terms of maintenance than regular weapons, they can be upgraded with three-positional gas regulation devices.
en.st_up_auts_b3_name: Installation of an automatic three-position gas regulation device
en.st_up_auts_c1_descr: Sputter prevents energy from dispersing, which increases bullet impulse.
en.st_up_auts_c1_name: Tuning of automatic parts using sputter
en.st_up_auts_c2_descr: Installation of a long firing mechanism rod allows a sniper rifle to be fired in automatic mode.
en.st_up_auts_c3_descr: A stopping device affects the blowback mechanism, improving firing precision.
en.st_up_bar_a1_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves accuracy and flatness.
en.st_up_bar_a2_descr: The lack of big gas chambers and barrel mounting on the foregrip has a positive effect on accuracy.
en.st_up_bar_a3_descr: This modification is used to reduce the harm caused by excessive firing rate modifications.
en.st_up_bar_a3_name: Installation of a barrel with cooling fins
en.st_up_bar_b1_descr: Replacement of a dated component with a more modern one reduces recoil
en.st_up_bar_b2_descr: Installation of a barrel with additional threaded canals improves bullet speed and weapon accuracy at the cost of a considerable increase in recoil.
en.st_up_bar_b2_name: Additional threaded canals in the barrel
en.st_up_bar_b3_descr: This barrel is intended to increase the kill zone in close quarter combat and is therefore not suitable for accurate fire. Improves the rate of fire due to the simplification of the rifled part of the barrel.
en.st_up_bar_b3_name: Installation of a barrel with a simplified rifled section
en.st_up_bar_c1_descr: Polygon rifling is usually performed to improve accuracy.
en.st_up_bar_c1_name: Installation of a barrel with a polygon rifled section
en.st_up_bar_c2_descr: Allows barrel heat to be reduced and increases the rate of fire.
en.st_up_bar_c3_descr: A peculiar barrel replacement for weapons with good flatness characteristics that improves their accuracy.
en.st_up_bard_a1_descr: High durability materials slow down wear and tear of the weapon's barrel.
en.st_up_bard_b1_descr: Treatment of the internal surface of the barrel protects it from mechanical damage.
en.st_up_bard_b2_descr: Synthetic thickening of the barrel cavity causes a considerable improvement in groupings.
en.st_up_bard_b3_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves flatness.
en.st_up_bard_b4_descr: The introduction of gas venting canals to the barrel not only prevents it from collecting dirt, but also partially redirects recoil into the barrel itself.
en.st_up_bard_b5_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves flatness.
en.st_up_bard_b6_descr: This sputter prevents the barrel from overheating, removes manufacturing defects and significantly increases the barrel's life cycle.
en.st_up_bard_b6_name: Application of a protective sputter to the internal part of the barrel
en.st_up_bard_c1_descr: The barrel balancing system includes several mobile pistons that make a weapon more stable when held.
en.st_up_bard_c2_descr: The rifled part of the barrel makes it impossible to fire shot, but the accuracy achieved outweighs this drawback.
en.st_up_bard_c3_descr: Thickening with poly-materials allows barrel pressure to be increased, improving bullet speed.
en.st_up_bard_c4_descr: Cylindrical drilling of barrel helps to improve the weapon's rate of fire without affecting accuracy.
en.st_up_bard_c5_descr: When the weapon is fired, an active counter-weight simultaneously moves to the muzzle section of the barrel, thus compensating for part of the recoil.
en.st_up_bard_c5_name: Addition of an active counter-weight to the barrel jacket
en.st_up_barp_a1_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves accuracy and flatness, but reduces the rate of fire.
en.st_up_barp_a2_descr: Barrel perforation causes a reduction in recoil with gas escaping via special holes.
en.st_up_barp_a3_descr: A more technological shortened barrel improves the weapon's rate of fire without sacrificing flatness and accuracy.
en.st_up_barp_b1_descr: Chrome plating improves the barrel's life cycle.
en.st_up_barp_b1_name: Chrome plating of the internal side of the barrel
en.st_up_barp_b2_descr: Separators take on some of the recoil.
en.st_up_barp_b3_descr: A simplified rifled part is useful for close quarter combat where the emphasis is on the rate of fire rather than accuracy.
en.st_up_barp_b3_name: Installation of a barrel with a simplified rifled section
en.st_up_barp_b4_descr: Installation of a barrel with additional threaded canals improves bullet speed and weapon accuracy at the cost of a considerable increase in recoil.
en.st_up_barp_b4_name: Additional threaded canals in the barrel
en.st_up_barp_b5_descr: Unloading the barrel allows recoil to be reduced considerably.
en.st_up_barp_b5_name: Transferring the barrel compensator/flash reducer onto the frame
en.st_up_barp_c1_descr: Allows barrel heat to be reduced and increases the rate of fire without sacrificing flatness.
en.st_up_barp_c2_descr: Polygon rifling is usually performed to improve accuracy of sniper rifles.
en.st_up_barp_c2_name: Installation of a barrel with a polygon rifled section
en.st_up_barp_c3_descr: A pneumatic booster allows some of the recoil to be converted into higher barrel pressure, increasing muzzle velocity.
en.st_up_binoc_a1_descr: Installation of new lens set for farther distances, which offers x10 magnification power.
en.st_up_binoc_a2_descr: Installation of new lens set for farther distances, which offers x15 magnification power.
en.st_up_binoc_a3_descr: Installation of new lens set for great distances, which offers x20 magnification power.
en.st_up_binoc_b1_descr: ED glass installation that replaces the ordinary lens to minimize the effects of chromatic aberration and secondary spectrum, resulting in better visuals
en.st_up_binoc_b2_descr: Night vision technology installation for low light conditions, which relies on night-useful spectral and intensity range techniques to sense radiation that is invisible to a human observer.
en.st_up_binoc_b3_descr: An improvement to the night vision technology, which introduces better system light gain, system resolution and photosensitivity to increase the visual quality
en.st_up_binoc_c1_descr: Replacements to the housing style in order to reduce the overall weight by implementing an open-bridge and chassis made of an aluminium alloy.
en.st_up_bleed_1_descr: This small wave emitter is mounted on the back, effectively increasing blood clotting speed when worn constantly.
en.st_up_bleed_2_descr: Generation B injector, which regularly introduces a coagulation agent into the bloodstream when blood pressure drops significantly.
en.st_up_burn_1_descr: Fabric treated with a fire-resistant substance is popular among stalkers searching for fire artefacts.
en.st_up_burn_1_name: Fabric treated with a fire-resistant substance
en.st_up_burn_2_descr: Magnesium inserts protect the wearer from thermal dangers.
en.st_up_burn_3_descr: Fiberglass is used in bodysuits worn by natural disaster response teams.
en.st_up_burn_4_descr: Nickel is sufficiently fire-resistant to be used for body armour inserts
en.st_up_carry_1_descr: A system of mounts allows for weight to be distributed onto the whole body more evenly.
en.st_up_carry_1_name: A mount system for weight distribution
en.st_up_carry_2_descr: A back frame relieves focused shoulder load from carried weight by distributing it over the body, which increases maximum load.
en.st_up_chem_1_descr: Basic protection against rain and caustic substances coming into contact with the skin
en.st_up_chem_2_descr: Even a simple plastic inner layer can protect the wearer from chemical hazard.
en.st_up_chem_3_descr: Impregnated fabric should prevent chemical poisoning.
en.st_up_chem_4_descr: The lead mesh creates unbreachable chemical protection without sacrificing mobility.
en.st_up_chem_4_name: Lifesaver plexiglass bodysuit with flexible lead mesh
en.st_up_damage_1_descr: Thinner sheets of armour are layered to increase the armour's wear-resistance.
en.st_up_damage_2_descr: Increased number of titanium plates considerably improves body armour durability.
en.st_up_damage_3_descr: Mobile plates protect joints from wounds.
en.st_up_durability_1_descr: While those inserts don't mean improved protection, they do guarantee better durability.
en.st_up_durability_2_descr: Used in suits to improve outfit durability.
en.st_up_durability_3_descr: Reinforced plates that last longer to improve outfit durability.
en.st_up_health_1_descr: Generation A injector, developed by one of Kiev's research institutes, regularly injects the bloodstream with tiny doses of adrenalin, which may be dangerous but may also save your life in an emergency.
en.st_up_health_2_descr: An integrated system that monitors the wearer's health and supplies vitamins, adrenalin or anabolic substances as required.
en.st_up_health_3_descr: This wave emitter is mounted on the neck, and while its mechanism and method of operation are unclear, it has a strong calming effect.
en.st_up_health_3_name: Installation of a life support system
en.st_up_helm_burn_1_descr: Protective alloy frame to prevent thermal and electrical damage.
en.st_up_helm_chem_1_descr: A filter with a reinforced anti-corrosive coating with an additional preventing layer for removal of poisons.
en.st_up_helm_chem_1_name: Filter for work in contaminated areas
en.st_up_helm_chem_2_descr: Respirator for total blocking of poisons.
en.st_up_helm_rad_1_descr: Active filters can resist radioactive particles.
en.st_up_helm_rad_2_descr: A plexiglass mask can provide partial protection from radiation.
en.st_up_helm_stamina_1_descr: A set of filters used in contaminated air or critical air temperature conditions, which are too low or too high for breathing.
en.st_up_helm_tele_1_descr: Hi-tech psy-protection that is said to have been invented by a scientist called Sakharov.
en.st_up_opt_a2_descr: Mounting of an optical scope for medium and long range combat.
en.st_up_opt_a3_descr: Mounting of POSP 8x42 W scope for long range combat.
en.st_up_opt_a4_descr: Modification of optical scope for long range combat.
en.st_up_opt_a5_descr: Modification of optical scope for long range combat.
en.st_up_opt_a6_descr: Modification of optical scope for long range combat.
en.st_up_opt_b1_descr: A modification made to assault weapons with reflex sights by means of a simple improvement in sight contrast in the yellow range. Important for combat in twilight conditions and dim buildings.
en.st_up_opt_c1_descr: A heat visor allows the wearer to detect and identify matching heat sources.
en.st_up_opt_c2_descr: Night vision devices have saved many a sniper since their inception. 0.27 kg increase in weight.
en.st_up_opt_c3_descr: This modification allows the sight to be easily adjusted to the firing distance.
en.st_up_opt_dynamo_hand1_descr: Replacement of gear reducer for nylon reduces friction, which slightly improves the reliability and the longevity of the mechanism.
en.st_up_opt_dynamo_hand2_descr: Replacement of steel parts of the generator frame for duralumin significantly reducing the weight.
en.st_up_opt_dynamo_hand3_descr: Extra nikodimovich magnets on the rotor of the motor, increases the efficiency of the generator.
en.st_up_pri_a1_descr: A pneumatic stock is used to reduce recoil during burst fire.
en.st_up_pri_b1_descr: A mobile shoulder rest considerably reduces recoil impact on the body.
en.st_up_pri_b1_name: Installation of an amortization shoulder rest
en.st_up_pri_b2_descr: A more modern stock, which takes account of the specific nature of human physiology.
en.st_up_pri_c1_descr: When the weapon is fired, some of the powder gases are removed from the barrel into the cavity behind the bolt, ensuring that it stops smoothly on the way back.
en.st_up_pri_c1_name: Installation of a bolt assembly gas buffer
en.st_up_pri_c2_descr: Partial lengthening of the bolt frame into the stock allows flatness to be increased at the cost of more recoil.
en.st_up_pri_c2_name: Lengthening the bolt frame shock buffer
en.st_up_pri_c3_descr: Installation of a mobile component into the stock, which creates a counter-effect when the weapon is fired.
en.st_up_prih_a1_descr: A larger rest allows for accurate fire.
en.st_up_prih_b1_descr: An amortization spring recoil buffer partially removes the discomfort experienced when firing a hand-held machine gun.
en.st_up_prih_c1_descr: A bolt assembly buffer position in the stock takes on and absorbs most of the recoil.
en.st_up_pris_a1_descr: A rubberized recoil-softening part is often used on factory-made stocks for large calibre sniper rifles.
en.st_up_pris_b1_descr: An adjustable stock with a cheek pad is useful for firing from both convenient and inconvenient positions.
en.st_up_pris_b1_name: Adjustable stock with a cheek pad
en.st_up_pris_c1_descr: A component for large calibre weapons with powerful recoil installed in the stock.
en.st_up_rad_1_descr: Rubber is a basic way of protecting yourself from brief radiation exposure.
en.st_up_rad_2_descr: Plexiglass absorbs two types of radiation while being a lot lighter than lead.
en.st_up_rad_2_name: Plexiglass inner layer for radiation protection
en.st_up_rad_3_descr: Lead is a reliable defence against radiation because it absorbs all three types thereof.
en.st_up_ret_a1_descr: The reinforced spring is used to increase bullet speed.
en.st_up_ret_a2_descr: Installation of thickeners onto mobile parts of the mechanism ensure that the barrel deviates from the target less during firing.
en.st_up_ret_a3_descr: Installation of an additional spring with a reverse coil to reduce recoil without sacrificing flatness.
en.st_up_ret_b1_descr: Protective sputter increases reliability and, more importantly, ensures airtightness, which prevents energy dissipation.
en.st_up_ret_b2_descr: Titanium rods can endure a much higher rate of fire than regular rods.
